171. Multi-Task Anti-Causal Learning for Reconstructing Urban Events from Residents' Reports FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Liangkai Zhou, Susu Xu, Shuqi Zhong, Shan Lin
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了多任务反因果学习框架（MTAC），用于从居民报告中重建城市事件，在曼哈顿和纽瓦克的真实数据上相比基线方法将MAE降低了34.61%。
摘要翻译

许多现实世界的机器学习任务本质上是反因果的：它们需要从观测到的结果中推断潜在原因。在实践中，我们常面临多个相关任务，其中部分前向因果机制在任务间保持不变，而其他组件则具有任务特异性。我们提出了多任务反因果学习框架，该框架通过显式利用此类跨任务不变性，从结果和混杂因素中估计原因。MTAC首先进行因果发现以学习共享因果图，随后实例化一个结构化的多任务结构方程模型，该模型通过一个共享主干网络与任务特定输出头的架构，将结果生成过程分解为（i）任务不变机制和（ii）任务特定机制。基于学习得到的前向模型，MTAC执行最大后验概率推断，通过在学习到的因果结构下联合优化潜在机制变量与原因量级来重建原因。我们在从居民报告中重建城市事件的应用中评估MTAC，涵盖三个任务：违规停车、废弃房产和环境卫生问题。基于从曼哈顿和纽瓦克市收集的真实数据，MTAC相较于强基线模型持续提升了重建精度，实现了高达34.61%的平均绝对误差降低，并验证了跨任务学习可迁移因果机制的有效性。

Abstract

Many real-world machine learning tasks are anti-causal: they require inferring latent causes from observed effects. In practice, we often face multiple related tasks where part of the forward causal mechanism is invariant across tasks, while other components are task-specific. We propose Multi-Task Anti-Causal learning (MTAC), a framework for estimating causes from outcomes and confounders by explicitly exploiting such cross-task invariances. MTAC first performs causal discovery to learn a shared causal graph and then instantiates a structured multi-task structural equation model (SEM) that factorizes the outcome-generation process into (i) a task-invariant mechanism and (ii) task-specific mechanisms via a shared backbone with task-specific heads. Building on the learned forward model, MTAC performs maximum A posteriori (MAP)based inference to reconstruct causes by jointly optimizing latent mechanism variables and cause magnitudes under the learned causal structure. We evaluate MTAC on the application of urban event reconstruction from resident reports, spanning three tasks:parking violations, abandoned properties, and unsanitary conditions. On real-world data collected from Manhattan and the city of Newark, MTAC consistently improves reconstruction accuracy over strong baselines, achieving up to 34.61\% MAE reduction and demonstrating the benefit of learning transferable causal mechanisms across tasks.

172. One Supervisor, Many Modalities: Adaptive Tool Orchestration for Autonomous Queries FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Mayank Saini Arit Kumar Bishwas
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个用于自主多模态查询处理的AI代理框架，通过智能集中协调跨模态工具，显著减少了准确答案获取时间、对话返工和成本，同时保持准确性。
摘要翻译

我们提出一种用于自主多模态查询处理的智能体AI框架，该系统能够协调跨文本、图像、音频、视频及文档模态的专用工具。核心监督器（Supervisor）动态解析用户查询，将子任务分派至适配模态的工具（例如目标检测、OCR、光学字符识别、语音转录），并通过自适应路由策略（而非预定义决策树）综合处理结果。针对纯文本查询，框架采用基于RouteLLM的学习型路由机制；非文本路径则使用SLM辅助的模态分解方法。通过在15个任务类别、总计2,847条查询上的评估，本框架在保持准确率相当的前提下，相比匹配的层次化基线实现了准确答案获取时间减少72%、对话返工量降低85%、成本下降67%的效果。这些结果表明，智能化的集中式编排机制能从本质上改善多模态AI部署的经济性。

Abstract

We present an agentic AI framework for autonomous multimodal query processing that coordinates specialized tools across text, image, audio, video, and document modalities. A central Supervisor dynamically decomposes user queries, delegates subtasks to modality-appropriate tools (e.g., object detection, OCR, speech transcription), and synthesizes results through adaptive routing strategies rather than predetermined decision trees. For text-only queries, the framework uses learned routing via RouteLLM, while non-text paths use SLM-assisted modality decomposition. Evaluated on 2,847 queries across 15 task categories, our framework achieves 72% reduction in time-to-accurate-answer, 85% reduction in conversational rework, and 67% cost reduction compared to the matched hierarchical baseline while maintaining accuracy parity. These results demonstrate that intelligent centralized orchestration fundamentally improves multimodal AI deployment economics.

173. Simultaneous estimation of multiple discrete unimodal distributions under stochastic order constraints FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Yasuhiro Yoshida, Noriyoshi Sukegawa, Jiro Iwanaga
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种在随机序约束下估计多个离散单峰分布的方法，通过混合整数凸二次优化实现，实验表明在小样本情况下能平均降低2.2%的Jensen-Shannon散度。
摘要翻译

本研究针对现实平台搜索行为分析中估计多个离散单峰分布的问题展开。为融入分布间优先关系的先验知识，我们引入随机序约束，并将估计任务构建为混合整数凸二次优化问题。在合成与真实数据集上的实验表明：当样本量较小时，所提方法平均降低Jensen-Shannon散度2.2%（最高可达6.3%）；而在数据充足时，其性能与现有方法相当。

Abstract

We study the problem of estimating multiple discrete unimodal distributions, motivated by search behavior analysis on a real-world platform. To incorporate prior knowledge of precedence relations among distributions, we impose stochastic order constraints and formulate the estimation task as a mixed-integer convex quadratic optimization problem. Experiments on both synthetic and real datasets show that the proposed method reduces the Jensen-Shannon divergence by 2.2% on average (up to 6.3%) when the sample size is small, while performing comparably to existing methods when sufficient data are available.

174. CFD-HAR: User-controllable Privacy through Conditional Feature Disentanglement FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Alex Gn, Fan Li, S Kuniyilh, Ada Axan
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了在物联网人类活动识别中，通过特征解缠实现用户可控隐私保护的技术，并与基于自编码器的少样本学习方法比较，发现两者均无法完全满足下一代系统的隐私、适应性和鲁棒性需求。
摘要翻译

现代可穿戴与移动设备普遍配备惯性测量单元（IMU）。基于此类设备运行的人类活动识别（HAR）应用采用以机器学习为基础的数据驱动技术，利用传感器数据进行识别。然而，依赖传感器数据的HAR部署面临两大关键挑战：一是依据用户隐私偏好保护传感器数据中嵌入的敏感信息，二是在有限标注样本条件下保持高识别性能。本文提出一种基于特征解耦的表征学习技术，通过细粒度动态隐私过滤实现用户可控的隐私保护。我们还将该技术与基于自编码器的少样本HAR表征学习方法进行效能对比，从架构设计、学习目标、隐私保障性、数据效率及边缘物联网（IoT）部署适用性等方面展开分析。研究表明：基于条件特征解耦（CFD）的HAR通过在潜在空间分离活动特征与敏感属性，提供了显式可调的隐私保护机制；而基于自编码器的少样本HAR虽具有更优的标签效率与轻量级适应能力，却缺乏内在的隐私保障机制。我们进一步探讨了两种方法在持续学习物联网环境中的安全影响，揭示了它们在表征泄露与嵌入层攻击脆弱性方面的差异。分析表明，单一范式均无法完全满足下一代物联网HAR系统的新兴需求。最后，本文展望了未来研究方向，指出应构建能协同优化隐私保护、少样本适应能力与系统鲁棒性的统一框架，以实现可信的物联网智能系统。

Abstract

Modern wearable and mobile devices are equipped with inertial measurement units (IMUs). Human Activity Recognition (HAR) applications running on such devices use machine-learning-based, data-driven techniques that leverage such sensor data. However, sensor-data-driven HAR deployments face two critical challenges: protecting sensitive user information embedded in sensor data in accordance with users' privacy preferences and maintaining high recognition performance with limited labeled samples. This paper proposes a technique for user-controllable privacy through feature disentanglement-based representation learning at the granular level for dynamic privacy filtering. We also compare the efficacy of our technique against few-shot HAR using autoencoder-based representation learning. We analyze their architectural designs, learning objectives, privacy guarantees, data efficiency, and suitability for edge Internet of Things (IoT) deployment. Our study shows that CFD-based HAR provides explicit, tunable privacy protection controls by separating activity and sensitive attributes in the latent space, whereas autoencoder-based few-shot HAR offers superior label efficiency and lightweight adaptability but lacks inherent privacy safeguards. We further examine the security implications of both approaches in continual IoT settings, highlighting differences in susceptibility to representation leakage and embedding-level attacks. The analysis reveals that neither paradigm alone fully satisfies the emerging requirements of next-generation IoT HAR systems. We conclude by outlining research directions toward unified frameworks that jointly optimize privacy preservation, few-shot adaptability, and robustness for trustworthy IoT intelligence.

175. Gen-Fab: A Variation-Aware Generative Model for Predicting Fabrication Variations in Nanophotonic Devices FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Rambod Azimi, Yuri Grinberg, Dan-Xia Xu, Odile Liboiron-Ladouceur
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了Gen-Fab，一种基于条件生成对抗网络的生成模型，用于预测纳米光子器件制造过程中的几何变异，并在准确性和不确定性建模方面优于多种基线方法。
摘要翻译

硅基光子器件常因制造工艺引入诸如过刻蚀、欠刻蚀及圆角化等变异，这些变异会显著改变器件性能。此类变异具有非均匀性，并受特征尺寸与形状的影响。因此，需要精确的数字孪生模型来预测给定设计可能产出的制造结果范围。本文提出Gen-Fab，一种基于Pix2Pix的条件生成对抗网络（conditional Generative Adversarial Network, cGAN），用于预测并建模光子制造结果中的不确定性。该方法以设计版图（GDS格式）为输入，生成多样化的高分辨率预测图像，其类似于制造器件的扫描电子显微镜（Scanning Electron Microscope, SEM）图像，能够捕捉纳米尺度工艺变异的范围。为实现一对多映射，我们在模型瓶颈处注入潜在噪声向量。我们将Gen-Fab与三种基线方法进行比较：（1）确定性U-Net预测器，（2）推理时蒙特卡洛Dropout U-Net，以及（3）可变U-Net集成模型。在已制造光子测试结构的分布外数据集上的评估表明，Gen-Fab在准确性和不确定性建模方面均优于所有基线方法。额外的分布偏移分析进一步证实了其对未见制造几何结构的强泛化能力。Gen-Fab取得了最高的交并比（Intersection-over-Union, IoU）分数89.8%，优于确定性U-Net（85.3%）、MC-Dropout U-Net（83.4%）和可变U-Net集成模型（85.8%）。同时，其预测结果与真实制造结果的分布更为吻合，获得了更低的Kullback-Leibler散度与Wasserstein距离。

Abstract

Silicon photonic devices often exhibit fabrication-induced variations such as over-etching, underetching, and corner rounding, which can significantly alter device performance. These variations are non-uniform and are influenced by feature size and shape. Accurate digital twins are therefore needed to predict the range of possible fabricated outcomes for a given design. In this paper, we introduce Gen-Fab, a conditional generative adversarial network (cGAN) based on Pix2Pix to predict and model uncertainty in photonic fabrication outcomes. The proposed method takes a design layout (in GDS format) as input and produces diverse high-resolution predictions similar to scanning electron microscope (SEM) images of fabricated devices, capturing the range of process variations at the nanometer scale. To enable one-to-many mapping, we inject a latent noise vector at the model bottleneck. We compare Gen-Fab against three baselines: (1) a deterministic U-Net predictor, (2) an inference-time Monte Carlo Dropout U-Net, and (3) an ensemble of varied U-Nets. Evaluations on an out-of-distribution dataset of fabricated photonic test structures demonstrate that Gen-Fab outperforms all baselines in both accuracy and uncertainty modeling. An additional distribution shift analysis further confirms its strong generalization to unseen fabrication geometries. Gen-Fab achieves the highest intersection-over-union (IoU) score of 89.8%, outperforming the deterministic U-Net (85.3%), the MC-Dropout U-Net (83.4%), and varying U-Nets (85.8%). It also better aligns with the distribution of real fabrication outcomes, achieving lower Kullback-Leibler divergence and Wasserstein distance.

176. LongFlow: Efficient KV Cache Compression for Reasoning M FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Yi Su, Zhenxu Tian, Dan Qiao, Yuechi Zhou, Juntao Li, Min Zhang
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种名为LongFlow的KV缓存压缩方法，通过高效的注意力计算中间结果进行重要性估计，解决了推理模型长输出序列导致的高内存消耗和带宽压力问题，实现了高达11.8倍的吞吐量提升和80%的KV缓存压缩，同时保持模型精度。
摘要翻译

近期如OpenAI-o1与DeepSeek-R1等推理模型在数学推理和代码生成等复杂任务上展现出强劲性能。然而，这种性能提升伴随着输出序列的大幅延长，导致部署成本显著增加。特别是长输出需要庞大的键值（KV）缓存，造成高内存消耗及注意力计算过程中严重的带宽压力。现有大多数KV缓存优化方法针对长输入、短输出场景设计，对推理模型的长输出场景效果有限。此外，先前研究中的重要性评估计算成本高昂，在长序列生成过程中需要持续重评估时变得难以实施。为应对这些挑战，我们提出LongFlow——一种KV缓存压缩方法，其通过仅使用当前查询向量并基于注意力计算的中间结果，推导出高效的重要性评估指标。该设计引入的计算开销可忽略不计，且无需辅助存储。我们进一步开发了定制化内核，将FlashAttention、重要性评估与令牌淘汰机制融合为单一优化算子，提升了系统级效率。实验表明，LongFlow在实现80% KV缓存压缩的同时，最高可获得11.8倍的吞吐量提升，且对模型精度影响极小。

Abstract

Recent reasoning models such as OpenAI-o1 and DeepSeek-R1 have shown strong performance on complex tasks including mathematical reasoning and code generation. However, this performance gain comes with substantially longer output sequences, leading to significantly increased deployment costs. In particular, long outputs require large KV caches, resulting in high memory consumption and severe bandwidth pressure during attention computation. Most existing KV cache optimization methods are designed for long-input, short-output scenarios and are ineffective for the long-output setting of reasoning models. Moreover, importance estimation in prior work is computationally expensive and becomes prohibitive when continuous re-evaluation is required during long generation. To address these challenges, we propose LongFlow, a KV cache compression method with an efficient importance estimation metric derived from an intermediate result of attention computation using only the current query. This design introduces negligible computational overhead and requires no auxiliary storage. We further develop a custom kernel that fuses FlashAttention, importance estimation, and token eviction into a single optimized operator, improving system-level efficiency. Experiments show that LongFlow achieves up to an 11.8 times throughput improvement with 80% KV cache compression with minimal impact on model accuracy.

177. Sharpness-Aware Minimization for Generalized Embedding Learning in Federated Recommendation FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Fengyuan Yu, Xiaohua Feng, Yuyuan Li, Changwang Zhang, Jun Wang, Chaochao Chen
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文针对联邦推荐系统中由于数据异构性和稀疏性导致的项目嵌入学习不稳定问题，提出了基于锐度感知最小化的联邦推荐框架FedRecGEL，显著提升了推荐性能。
摘要翻译

联邦推荐系统能够在保持用户交互数据本地化的同时，仅共享必要的模型参数以进行协同模型训练，从而降低隐私风险。然而，现有方法忽视了一个关键问题，即在联邦推荐系统训练过程中，如何稳定地学习泛化的物品嵌入。物品嵌入在促进跨客户端知识共享方面起着核心作用。然而，在跨设备设置下，本地数据分布呈现出显著的异构性和稀疏性，这加剧了学习泛化嵌入的难度。这些因素使得稳定学习泛化的物品嵌入，对于实现有效的联邦推荐既不可或缺又本质上难以达成。为填补这一空白，我们提出了一种新的联邦推荐框架，命名为基于泛化嵌入学习的联邦推荐。我们从以物品为中心的视角重新构建了联邦推荐问题，并将其视为一个多任务学习问题，旨在整个训练过程中学习泛化的嵌入。基于理论分析，我们采用锐度感知最小化方法来处理泛化问题，从而稳定训练过程并提升推荐性能。在四个数据集上的大量实验证明了FedRecGEL在显著提升联邦推荐性能方面的有效性。我们的代码发布于https://github.com/anonymifish/FedRecGEL。

Abstract

Federated recommender systems enable collaborative model training while keeping user interaction data local and sharing only essential model parameters, thereby mitigating privacy risks. However, existing methods overlook a critical issue, i.e., the stable learning of a generalized item embedding throughout the federated recommender system training process. Item embedding plays a central role in facilitating knowledge sharing across clients. Yet, under the cross-device setting, local data distributions exhibit significant heterogeneity and sparsity, exacerbating the difficulty of learning generalized embeddings. These factors make the stable learning of generalized item embeddings both indispensable for effective federated recommendation and inherently difficult to achieve. To fill this gap, we propose a new federated recommendation framework, named Federated Recommendation with Generalized Embedding Learning (FedRecGEL). We reformulate the federated recommendation problem from an item-centered perspective and cast it as a multi-task learning problem, aiming to learn generalized embeddings throughout the training procedure. Based on theoretical analysis, we employ sharpness-aware minimization to address the generalization problem, thereby stabilizing the training process and enhancing recommendation performance. Extensive experiments on four datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of FedRecGEL in significantly improving federated recommendation performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/anonymifish/FedRecGEL.

Authors: Qizhi Chen, Chao Qi, Yihong Huang, Muquan Li, Rongzheng Wang, Dongyang Zhang, Ke Qin, Shuang Liang
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种名为KEPo的新型投毒攻击方法，专门针对基于图的检索增强生成（GraphRAG）系统，通过伪造知识演化路径来毒化知识图谱，从而误导大型语言模型产生攻击者指定的有害响应，实验表明该方法在单目标和多目标攻击场景下均取得了最先进的攻击成功率。
摘要翻译

基于图结构的检索增强生成（GraphRAG）通过从外部数据库构建知识图谱（KG）来提升大语言模型（LLM）生成内容的时效性与准确性。然而，这种对外部数据的依赖引入了新的攻击面。攻击者可将投毒文本注入数据库，从而操纵LLM针对攻击者选定的查询生成有害的目标回答。现有研究主要集中于攻击传统RAG系统，但此类方法对GraphRAG效果有限。这种鲁棒性源于GraphRAG的知识图谱抽象机制——其在检索前将注入的文本重组为图结构，使得LLM能够基于重构后的上下文而非原始投毒段落进行推理。为揭示GraphRAG中潜在的安全漏洞，本文提出知识演化投毒（KEPo），一种专为GraphRAG设计的新型投毒攻击方法。针对每个目标查询，KEPo首先基于目标答案生成包含投毒知识的有害事件；通过虚构事件背景并伪造从原始事实到有害事件的知识演化路径，进而污染知识图谱，误导LLM将投毒知识视为最终结论。在多目标攻击场景中，KEPo进一步连接多个攻击语料，使投毒知识相互增强，同时扩大投毒社群规模，从而提升攻击效果。在多数据集上的实验结果表明，KEPo在单目标与多目标攻击中均达到当前最优的攻击成功率，显著优于现有方法。

Abstract

Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) constructs the Knowledge Graph (KG) from external databases to enhance the timeliness and accuracy of Large Language Model (LLM) generations.However,this reliance on external data introduces new attack surfaces.Attackers can inject poisoned texts into databases to manipulate LLMs into producing harmful target responses for attacker-chosen queries.Existing research primarily focuses on attacking conventional RAG systems.However,such methods are ineffective against GraphRAG.This robustness derives from the KG abstraction of GraphRAG,which reorganizes injected text into a graph before retrieval,thereby enabling the LLM to reason based on the restructured context instead of raw poisoned passages.To expose latent security vulnerabilities in GraphRAG,we propose Knowledge Evolution Poison (KEPo),a novel poisoning attack method specifically designed for GraphRAG.For each target query,KEPo first generates a toxic event containing poisoned knowledge based on the target answer.By fabricating event backgrounds and forging knowledge evolution paths from original facts to the toxic event,it then poisons the KG and misleads the LLM into treating the poisoned knowledge as the final result.In multi-target attack scenarios,KEPo further connects multiple attack corpora,enabling their poisoned knowledge to mutually reinforce while expanding the scale of poisoned communities,thereby amplifying attack effectiveness.Experimental results across multiple datasets demonstrate that KEPo achieves state-of-the-art attack success rates for both single-target and multi-target attacks,significantly outperforming previous methods.

179. Attention Sinks Are Provably Necessary in Softmax Transformers: Evidence from Trigger-Conditional Tasks FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Yuval Ran-Milo
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文证明了在softmax自注意力Transformer模型中，计算简单的触发条件行为必然会产生注意力汇聚现象，并通过理论分析和实验表明这种汇聚是由归一化约束驱动的，而ReLU注意力可以解决相同任务而不产生汇聚。
摘要翻译

Transformer模型常表现出注意力汇聚现象：概率质量会集中于一个固定且与内容无关的位置。我们证明，在softmax自注意力模型中计算简单的触发条件行为必然会导致汇聚现象的产生。我们的研究结果形式化了一个常见直觉：在概率单纯形上的归一化操作会迫使注意力坍缩到一个稳定的锚点，以实现默认状态（例如当模型需要忽略输入时）。我们通过一个具体任务实例化这一现象：当指定的触发标记出现时，模型必须返回所有先前标记表征的平均值，否则输出零值——该任务模拟了实际注意力头的工作机制（Barbero等人，2025；Guo等人，2024）。我们还证明了非归一化的ReLU注意力机制可以在不产生任何汇聚的情况下完成相同任务，这证实了归一化约束是汇聚行为的根本驱动力。实验验证了我们的理论预测，并表明该现象可拓展至理论分析范围之外：softmax模型会产生强烈的汇聚效应，而ReLU注意力机制在单头与多头变体中均能消除此类现象。

Abstract

Transformers often display an attention sink: probability mass concentrates on a fixed, content-agnostic position. We prove that computing a simple trigger-conditional behavior necessarily induces a sink in softmax self-attention models. Our results formalize a familiar intuition: normalization over a probability simplex must force attention to collapse onto a stable anchor to realize a default state (e.g., when the model needs to ignore the input). We instantiate this with a concrete task: when a designated trigger token appears, the model must return the average of all preceding token representations, and otherwise output zero, a task which mirrors the functionality of attention heads in the wild (Barbero et al., 2025; Guo et al., 2024). We also prove that non-normalized ReLU attention can solve the same task without any sink, confirming that the normalization constraint is the fundamental driver of sink behavior. Experiments validate our predictions and demonstrate they extend beyond the theoretically analyzed setting: softmax models develop strong sinks while ReLU attention eliminates them in both single-head and multi-head variants.

关键词

attention sinks, softmax transformers, self-attention models, normalization constraint, trigger-conditional tasks, ReLU attention, theoretical analysis, probability simplex

180. Grammar of the Wave: Towards Explainable Multivariate Time Series Event Detection via Neuro-Symbolic VLM Agents FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Sky Chenwei Wan, Tianjun Hou, Yifei Wang, Xiqing Chang, Aymeric Jan
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个基于知识引导和神经符号VLM代理的框架，用于解决多变量时间序列事件检测中语义理解与信号形态匹配的挑战，并通过事件逻辑树（ELT）实现了零样本或少样本下的准确检测与可解释性输出。
摘要翻译

时间序列事件检测（Time Series Event Detection, TSED）长期以来一直是一项重要任务，在诸多高风险领域具有关键应用价值。与统计异常不同，事件由具有复杂内部结构的语义所定义，在现实场景中难以从稀缺的标注数据中进行归纳学习。鉴于此，我们提出知识引导的时间序列事件检测，这是一种新的设定：模型接收自然语言事件描述，并须在极少或没有训练数据的情况下，将其定位到多元信号中的时间区间。为应对这一挑战，我们引入了事件逻辑树（Event Logic Tree, ELT），这是一个新颖的知识表示框架，通过建模事件内在的时间逻辑结构，来桥接语言描述与物理时间序列数据。基于ELT，我们提出了一种神经符号视觉语言模型智能体框架，该框架迭代地从信号可视化中实例化基本单元，并在ELT约束下组合它们，从而以实例化树的形式生成检测区间及可信的解释。为验证方法的有效性，我们发布了一个基于真实世界时间序列数据、包含专家知识与标注的基准测试。实验与人工评估表明，相较于监督微调基线以及现有基于大语言模型/视觉语言模型的零样本时间序列推理框架，我们的方法具有优越性。我们还证明，ELT在缓解视觉语言模型固有的、将信号形态与事件语义匹配时的幻觉问题方面至关重要。

Abstract

Time Series Event Detection (TSED) has long been an important task with critical applications across many high-stakes domains. Unlike statistical anomalies, events are defined by semantics with complex internal structures, which are difficult to learn inductively from scarce labeled data in real-world settings. In light of this, we introduce Knowledge-Guided TSED, a new setting where a model is given a natural-language event description and must ground it to intervals in multivariate signals with little or no training data. To tackle this challenge, we introduce Event Logic Tree (ELT), a novel knowledge representation framework to bridge linguistic descriptions and physical time series data via modeling the intrinsic temporal-logic structures of events. Based on ELT, we present a neuro-symbolic VLM agent framework that iteratively instantiates primitives from signal visualizations and composes them under ELT constraints, producing both detected intervals and faithful explanations in the form of instantiated trees. To validate the effectiveness of our approach, we release a benchmark based on real-world time series data with expert knowledge and annotations. Experiments and human evaluation demonstrate the superiority of our method compared to supervised fine-tuning baselines and existing zero-shot time series reasoning frameworks based on LLMs/VLMs. We also show that ELT is critical in mitigating VLMs' inherent hallucination in matching signal morphology with event semantics.

181. Leveraging Phytolith Research using Artificial Intelligence FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Andrés G. Mejía Ramón, Kate Dudgeon, Nina Witteveen, Dolores Piperno, Michael Kloster, Luigi Palopoli, Mónica Moraes R., José M. Capriles, Umberto Lombardo
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文开发了一个名为Sorometry的端到端人工智能流程，用于高通量数字化、推断和解释植物硅体，以解决传统植物硅体分析中劳动密集型手动显微镜的瓶颈问题，并在玻利维亚亚马逊的考古样本中实现了高分类和分割准确率。
摘要翻译

植硅体分析是重建古植被和人类活动的关键工具，但传统方法受限于劳动密集型、耗时的人工显微镜观察。为突破这一瓶颈，我们提出“植硅体组学”：一种用于植硅体高通量数字化、推断与解释的综合性端到端人工智能流程。该工作流程通过处理Z轴堆叠的光学显微镜扫描数据，自动生成单个微观颗粒的同步二维正射影像与三维点云。我们开发了一种多模态融合模型，结合了用于二维图像分析的ConvNeXt与用于三维点云分析的PointNet++，并辅以支持专家标注与复核的图形用户界面。在玻利维亚亚马逊地区的参考标本库及考古样本上进行测试后，我们的融合模型在24种诊断形态类型上实现了77.9%的总体分类准确率，分割质量达到84.5%。关键的是，三维数据的整合被证明对于区分复杂形态类型（如禾本科硅质短细胞植硅体）至关重要，因为这些类型的诊断特征在二维投影中常因取向问题而被掩盖。除单个对象分类外，植硅体组学还整合了贝叶斯有限混合模型，用于在组合层面预测植物来源的整体贡献，成功在复杂混合样本中识别出如玉米和棕榈等特定植物。这一集成平台将植硅体研究转变为“组学”尺度的学科，极大拓展了分析能力，标准化了专家判断，并实现了对考古与古生态组合的可重复、群体水平的特征描述。

Abstract

Phytolith analysis is a crucial tool for reconstructing past vegetation and human activities, but traditional methods are severely limited by labour-intensive, time-consuming manual microscopy. To address this bottleneck, we present Sorometry: a comprehensive end-to-end artificial intelligence pipeline for the high-throughput digitisation, inference, and interpretation of phytoliths. Our workflow processes z-stacked optical microscope scans to automatically generate synchronised 2D orthoimages and 3D point clouds of individual microscopic particles. We developed a multimodal fusion model that combines ConvNeXt for 2D image analysis and PointNet++ for 3D point cloud analysis, supported by a graphical user interface for expert annotation and review. Tested on reference collections and archaeological samples from the Bolivian Amazon, our fusion model achieved a global classification accuracy of 77.9\% across 24 diagnostic morphotypes and 84.5% for segmentation quality. Crucially, the integration of 3D data proved essential for distinguishing complex morphotypes (such as grass silica short cell phytoliths) whose diagnostic features are often obscured by their orientation in 2D projections. Beyond individual object classification, Sorometry incorporates Bayesian finite mixture modelling to predict overall plant source contributions at the assemblage level, successfully identifying specific plants like maize and palms in complex mixed samples. This integrated platform transforms phytolith research into an "omics"-scale discipline, dramatically expanding analytical capacity, standardising expert judgements, and enabling reproducible, population-level characterisations of archaeological and paleoecological assemblages.

182. Deep Learning Network-Temporal Models For Traffic Prediction FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Yufeng Xin, Ethan Fan
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文针对网络流量预测问题，提出了两种深度学习模型（图注意力网络和微调的大型语言模型），在真实数据集上验证了它们优于传统统计方法和LSTM模型，其中LLM模型在整体预测和泛化性能上表现更优，而GAT模型在减少预测方差方面更强。
摘要翻译

时间序列分析对于新兴网络智能控制与管理功能至关重要。然而，现有的基于统计方法和浅层机器学习模型在多变量时间序列预测方面表现出有限的能力。网络数据中复杂的拓扑依赖关系和动态时序模式要求新的建模方法。本文基于系统的多变量时间序列模型研究，提出了两种旨在同时学习时序模式与网络拓扑关联的深度学习模型：一种定制化的网络-时序图注意力网络（GAT）模型，以及一种结合聚类序曲的微调多模态大语言模型（LLM）。两种模型均与已优于统计方法的长短期记忆（LSTM）模型进行对比研究。通过对真实网络数据集进行大量训练与性能分析，基于LLM的模型展现出更优的整体预测与泛化性能，而GAT模型则在降低时间序列及预测跨度上的预测方差方面表现出优势。更详细的分析还揭示了时间序列及不同预测跨度上相关性变异与预测分布差异的重要洞见。

Abstract

Time series analysis is critical for emerging net- work intelligent control and management functions. However, existing statistical-based and shallow machine learning models have shown limited prediction capabilities on multivariate time series. The intricate topological interdependency and complex temporal patterns in network data demand new model approaches. In this paper, based on a systematic multivariate time series model study, we present two deep learning models aiming for learning both temporal patterns and network topological correlations at the same time: a customized network-temporal graph attention network (GAT) model and a fine-tuned multi-modal large language model (LLM) with a clustering overture. Both models are studied against an LSTM model that already outperforms the statistical methods. Through extensive training and performance studies on a real-world network dataset, the LLM-based model demonstrates superior overall prediction and generalization performance, while the GAT model shows its strength in reducing prediction variance across the time series and horizons. More detailed analysis also reveals important insights into correlation variability and prediction distribution discrepancies over time series and different prediction horizons.

183. Slack More, Predict Better: Proximal Relaxation for Probabilistic Latent Variable Model-based Soft Sensors FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Zehua Zou, Yiran Ma, Yulong Zhang, Zhengnan Li, Zeyu Yang, Jinhao Xie, Xiaoyu Jiang, Zhichao Chen
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文针对传统非线性概率隐变量模型在软传感器建模中因变分推断近似误差导致精度下降的问题，提出了一种基于Wasserstein距离近端松弛的新方法KProxNPLVM，通过理论证明和实验验证有效减少了近似误差并提高了预测性能。
摘要翻译

非线性概率潜变量模型（Nonlinear Probabilistic Latent Variable Models, NPLVMs）因其不确定性刻画能力而成为软测量建模的基石。然而，传统的NPLVMs采用摊销变分推断进行训练，其中神经网络对变分后验进行参数化。尽管这便于模型实现，但该参数化将无限维函数空间中的分布优化问题转化为有限维参数空间中的参数优化问题，从而引入了近似误差间隙，降低了软测量建模的准确性。为缓解此问题，本文提出KProxNPLVM，一种新型NPLVM，其核心转向松弛目标函数本身以提升NPLVM性能。具体而言，我们首先证明了传统方法所引致的近似误差。基于此，我们设计以Wasserstein距离作为邻近算子来松弛学习目标，通过求解该松弛优化问题推导出一种新的变分推断策略。在此基础上，我们严格推导了KProxNPLVM的优化实现，证明了所提算法最终能够规避近似误差并确保收敛性，进而通过总结上述内容提出了KProxNPLVM。最后，在合成数据集与真实工业数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了所提KProxNPLVM的有效性。

Abstract

Nonlinear Probabilistic Latent Variable Models (NPLVMs) are a cornerstone of soft sensor modeling due to their capacity for uncertainty delineation. However, conventional NPLVMs are trained using amortized variational inference, where neural networks parameterize the variational posterior. While facilitating model implementation, this parameterization converts the distributional optimization problem within an infinite-dimensional function space to parameter optimization within a finite-dimensional parameter space, which introduces an approximation error gap, thereby degrading soft sensor modeling accuracy. To alleviate this issue, we introduce KProxNPLVM, a novel NPLVM that pivots to relaxing the objective itself and improving the NPLVM's performance. Specifically, we first prove the approximation error induced by the conventional approach. Based on this, we design the Wasserstein distance as the proximal operator to relax the learning objective, yielding a new variational inference strategy derived from solving this relaxed optimization problem. Based on this foundation, we provide a rigorous derivation of KProxNPLVM's optimization implementation, prove the convergence of our algorithm can finally sidestep the approximation error, and propose the KProxNPLVM by summarizing the abovementioned content. Finally, extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world industrial datasets are conducted to demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed KProxNPLVM.

184. HawkesRank: Event-Driven Centrality for Real-Time Importance Ranking FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Didier Sornette, Yishan Luo, Sandro Claudio Lera
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个基于多元霍克斯点过程的动态网络重要性排名框架HawkesRank，用于量化网络中的影响力，并通过模拟和在线通信平台的情感动态分析证明其优于静态中心性指标。
摘要翻译

量化网络影响力在科学、经济学和公共卫生领域具有重要意义，然而广泛使用的中心性度量方法仍存在局限：它们依赖于静态表征、启发式网络构建以及纯粹内源的重要性概念，同时与可观测活动之间缺乏语义关联。我们提出HawkesRank，这是一个基于多元霍克斯点过程的动态框架，能够建模外生驱动因素（内在贡献）与内生放大效应（自我激励与交叉激励）。该方法产生了一种基于原理、经实证校准且具有自适应性的重要性度量。经典指标如卡茨中心性与PageRank可作为该框架的平均场极限而自然导出，从而明确了其有效性与局限性。与静态平均值不同，HawkesRank通过瞬时事件强度来度量重要性，具备预测能力、透明的内生-外生分解机制以及对冲击的适应性。通过对在线交流平台中情绪动态的模拟与实证分析，我们证明HawkesRank能紧密追踪系统活动，并持续优于静态中心性度量指标。

Abstract

Quantifying influence in networks is important across science, economics, and public health, yet widely used centrality measures remain limited: they rely on static representations, heuristic network constructions, and purely endogenous notions of importance, while offering little semantic connection to observable activity. We introduce HawkesRank, a dynamic framework grounded in multivariate Hawkes point processes that models exogenous drivers (intrinsic contributions) and endogenous amplification (self- and cross-excitation). This yields a principled, empirically calibrated, and adaptive importance measure. Classical indices such as Katz centrality and PageRank emerge as mean-field limits of the framework, clarifying both their validity and their limitations. Unlike static averages, HawkesRank measures importance through instantaneous event intensities, enabling prediction, transparent endo-exo decomposition, and adaptability to shocks. Using both simulations and empirical analysis of emotion dynamics in online communication platforms, we show that HawkesRank closely tracks system activity and consistently outperforms static centrality metrics.

185. Bridging Discrete Marks and Continuous Dynamics: Dual-Path Cross-Interaction for Marked Temporal Point Processes FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Yuxiang Liu, Qiao Liu, Tong Luo, Yanglei Gan, Peng He, Yao LIu
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种名为NEXTPP的双通道框架，通过离散和连续表示的交叉交互来改进标记时间点过程的预测，在多个真实数据集上超越了现有模型。
摘要翻译

预测带有离散标记的不规则间隔事件序列是一项重大挑战，这源于连续时间数据流中蕴含的复杂异步依赖关系。现有的序列方法能够捕捉事件标记之间的依赖关系，但忽略了事件之间连续演化的动态；而神经常微分方程方法虽能建模平滑的动态过程，却未能考虑事件类型如何影响未来的发生时间。为克服这些局限性，我们提出了NEXTPP——一个通过事件粒度的神经演化与交叉交互来统一离散与连续表示的双通道框架，专用于标记时间点过程。具体而言，NEXTPP通过自注意力机制编码离散事件标记，同时利用神经常微分方程演化一个潜在的连续时间状态。这两个并行流随后通过一个交叉注意力模块进行融合，以实现连续与离散表示之间显式的双向交互。融合后的表示驱动神经霍克斯过程的条件强度函数，并采用迭代细化采样器来生成未来事件。在五个真实世界数据集上的广泛评估表明，NEXTPP consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models。源代码可在 https://github.com/AONE-NLP/NEXTPP 获取。

Abstract

Predicting irregularly spaced event sequences with discrete marks poses significant challenges due to the complex, asynchronous dependencies embedded within continuous-time data streams.Existing sequential approaches capture dependencies among event tokens but ignore the continuous evolution between events, while Neural Ordinary Differential Equation (Neural ODE) methods model smooth dynamics yet fail to account for how event types influence future timing.To overcome these limitations, we propose NEXTPP, a dual-channel framework that unifies discrete and continuous representations via Event-granular Neural Evolution with Cross-Interaction for Marked Temporal Point Processes. Specifically, NEXTPP encodes discrete event marks via a self-attention mechanism, simultaneously evolving a latent continuous-time state using a Neural ODE. These parallel streams are then fused through a crossattention module to enable explicit bidirectional interaction between continuous and discrete representations. The fused representations drive the conditional intensity function of the neural Hawkes process, while an iterative thinning sampler is employed to generate future events. Extensive evaluations on five real-world datasets demonstrate that NEXTPP consistently outperforms state-of-the-art models. The source code can be found at https://github.com/AONE-NLP/NEXTPP.

186. UniHetCO: A Unified Heterogeneous Representation for Multi-Problem Learning in Unsupervised Neural Combinatorial Optimization FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Kien X. Nguyen, Ilya Safro
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了UniHetCO框架，通过统一的异构图表示和动态梯度加权方案，解决了多类图节点子集选择问题在无监督神经组合优化中的统一学习问题，并在多个数据集上展示了与先进方法竞争的性能和良好的跨问题适应能力。
摘要翻译

无监督神经组合优化（NCO）通过无需真实解标签、直接最小化实例目标与约束违反程度的方式训练基于学习的求解器，为监督方法提供了一种更具吸引力的替代方案。然而，针对图节点子集选择问题（如最大团问题与最大独立集问题），现有无监督方法通常仅针对单一问题类别设计，并依赖于问题特定的代理损失函数，这阻碍了在统一框架下进行跨类别学习。本研究提出UniHetCO，一种基于约束二次规划的组合优化的统一异构图表示方法，它将问题结构、目标项及线性约束编码于单一输入中。该表述使得能够通过统一的无标签目标训练一个跨多问题类别的单一模型。为提升多问题学习下的稳定性，我们采用基于梯度范数的动态加权策略，以缓解不同类别间的梯度失衡问题。在多个数据集及四个约束问题类别上的实验表明，该方法与当前最先进的无监督NCO基线相比具有竞争力，展现出强大的跨问题适应潜力，并能在严格时间限制下为商用经典求解器提供有效的热启动。

Abstract

Unsupervised neural combinatorial optimization (NCO) offers an appealing alternative to supervised approaches by training learning-based solvers without ground-truth solutions, directly minimizing instance objectives and constraint violations. Yet for graph node subset-selection problems (e.g., Maximum Clique and Maximum Independent Set), existing unsupervised methods are typically specialized to a single problem class and rely on problem-specific surrogate losses, which hinders learning across classes within a unified framework. In this work, we propose UniHetCO, a unified heterogeneous graph representation for constrained quadratic programming-based combinatorial optimization that encodes problem structure, objective terms, and linear constraints in a single input. This formulation enables training a single model across multiple problem classes with a unified label-free objective. To improve stability under multi-problem learning, we employ a gradient-norm-based dynamic weighting scheme that alleviates gradient imbalance among classes. Experiments on multiple datasets and four constrained problem classes demonstrate competitive performance with state-of-the-art unsupervised NCO baselines, strong cross-problem adaptation potential, and effective warm starts for a commercial classical solver under tight time limits.

187. ZTab: Domain-based Zero-shot Annotation for Table Columns FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Ehsan Hoseinzade, Ke Wang
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了ZTab框架，通过领域配置和伪表生成实现表格列语义类型的零样本标注，解决了现有方法在列类型数量大、表格结构理解有限和隐私风险方面的问题。
摘要翻译

本研究致力于解决关系表中语义列类型的自动检测难题，该任务是许多实际应用中的关键环节。零样本建模无需用户提供带标签的训练数据，因此在数据收集成本高昂或受隐私限制的场景中具有显著优势。然而，现有零样本模型在语义列类型数量较大时表现不佳，对表格结构的理解有限，且依赖高性能闭源大语言模型会引发隐私风险。我们提出了ZTab——一个基于领域的零样本框架，以同时满足性能与零样本需求。给定包含预定义语义类型集合及示例表结构的领域配置，ZTab会为示例结构生成伪表，并基于此对标注大语言模型进行微调。ZTab的“基于领域零样本”特性体现在其不依赖用户特定的标注训练数据；因此对于来自相似领域的测试表无需重新训练。我们阐述了基于领域零样本的三种应用场景。ZTab的领域配置在零样本程度与标注性能之间提供了平衡：包含所有语义类型的“通用领域”趋近于“纯粹”零样本，而包含特定应用语义类型的“专用领域”则能在该领域内实现更优的零样本性能。源代码与数据集已发布于https://github.com/hoseinzadeehsan/ZTab。

Abstract

This study addresses the challenge of automatically detecting semantic column types in relational tables, a key task in many real-world applications. Zero-shot modeling eliminates the need for user-provided labeled training data, making it ideal for scenarios where data collection is costly or restricted due to privacy concerns. However, existing zero-shot models suffer from poor performance when the number of semantic column types is large, limited understanding of tabular structure, and privacy risks arising from dependence on high-performance closed-source LLMs. We introduce ZTab, a domain-based zero-shot framework that addresses both performance and zero-shot requirements. Given a domain configuration consisting of a set of predefined semantic types and sample table schemas, ZTab generates pseudo-tables for the sample schemas and fine-tunes an annotation LLM on them. ZTab is domain-based zero-shot in that it does not depend on user-specific labeled training data; therefore, no retraining is needed for a test table from a similar domain. We describe three cases of domain-based zero-shot. The domain configuration of ZTab provides a trade-off between the extent of zero-shot and annotation performance: a "universal domain" that contains all semantic types approaches "pure" zero-shot, while a "specialized domain" that contains semantic types for a specific application enables better zero-shot performance within that domain. Source code and datasets are available at https://github.com/hoseinzadeehsan/ZTab

188. A Stable Neural Statistical Dependence Estimator for Autoencoder Feature Analysis FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Bo Hu, Jose C Principe
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种稳定的神经统计依赖估计器，用于分析自编码器的特征，通过变分高斯公式和正交密度比分解解决了确定性静态无噪声网络中互信息估计的难题，并提高了计算效率和稳定性。
摘要翻译

互信息等统计依赖性度量是分析自编码器的理想工具，但对于确定性的、静态的、无噪声的网络，其定义可能不适定。我们采用变分（高斯）框架，使得输入、潜在变量与重构之间的依赖性可被量化，并提出一种基于正交密度比分解的稳定神经依赖性估计器。与MINE不同，我们的方法避免了输入拼接和边缘分布乘积重配对，从而降低了计算成本并提升了稳定性。我们引入了一种高效的、类似非负矩阵分解的标量目标函数，并通过实验证明：假设高斯噪声以构建辅助变量，能够实现有意义的依赖性度量，并支持定量特征分析，同时呈现出奇异值的顺序收敛特性。

Abstract

Statistical dependence measures like mutual information is ideal for analyzing autoencoders, but it can be ill-posed for deterministic, static, noise-free networks. We adopt the variational (Gaussian) formulation that makes dependence among inputs, latents, and reconstructions measurable, and we propose a stable neural dependence estimator based on an orthonormal density-ratio decomposition. Unlike MINE, our method avoids input concatenation and product-of-marginals re-pairing, reducing computational cost and improving stability. We introduce an efficient NMF-like scalar objective and demonstrate empirically that assuming Gaussian noise to form an auxiliary variable enables meaningful dependence measurements and supports quantitative feature analysis, with a sequential convergence of singular values.

189. Zero-Shot Cross-City Generalization in End-to-End Autonomous Driving: Self-Supervised versus Supervised Representations FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Fatemeh Naeinian, Ali Hamza, Haoran Zhu, Anna Choromanska
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该研究探讨了端到端自动驾驶模型在不同城市间的零样本泛化问题，发现自监督视觉表示学习相比传统监督方法能显著提升跨城市轨迹规划的鲁棒性和泛化性能。
摘要翻译

端到端自动驾驶模型通常基于多城市数据集进行训练，并采用监督式ImageNet预训练主干网络，但其在未见城市中的泛化能力尚未得到充分检验。当训练数据与评估数据在地理上混合时，模型可能隐式依赖城市特定线索，从而掩盖了在真实领域迁移（即泛化至新地点）时可能出现的故障模式。本研究针对端到端轨迹规划任务中的零样本跨城市泛化问题展开探讨，重点探究自监督视觉表征是否能提升跨城市迁移性能。我们通过将自监督主干网络（I-JEPA、DINOv2和MAE）集成至规划框架中进行了系统性实验，并基于严格地理划分的数据进行评估：在nuScenes数据集上采用开环评估设置，在NAVSIM数据集上采用闭环评估协议。实验结果表明，当依赖传统监督式主干网络的模型迁移至具有不同道路拓扑和驾驶规范的城市时（特别是从右侧驾驶环境迁移至左侧驾驶环境），会出现显著的泛化能力下降。自监督表征学习能有效缩小这一差距。在开环评估中，监督式主干网络从波士顿迁移至新加坡时性能严重退化（L2位移误差比率为9.77倍，碰撞比率达19.43倍），而领域特定的自监督预训练可将该比率分别降至1.20倍和0.75倍。在闭环评估中，自监督预训练使所有单城市训练场景的PDMS指标提升最高达4%。这些结果表明，表征学习对跨城市规划的鲁棒性具有重要影响，同时确立了零样本地理迁移应作为评估端到端自动驾驶系统的必要测试标准。

Abstract

End-to-end autonomous driving models are typically trained on multi-city datasets using supervised ImageNet-pretrained backbones, yet their ability to generalize to unseen cities remains largely unexamined. When training and evaluation data are geographically mixed, models may implicitly rely on city-specific cues, masking failure modes that would occur under real domain shifts when generalizing to new locations. In this work we investigate zero-shot cross-city generalization in end-to-end trajectory planning and ask whether self-supervised visual representations improve transfer across cities. We conduct a comprehensive study by integrating self-supervised backbones (I-JEPA, DINOv2, and MAE) into planning frameworks. We evaluate performance under strict geographic splits on nuScenes in the open-loop setting and on NAVSIM in the closed-loop evaluation protocol. Our experiments reveal a substantial generalization gap when transferring models relying on traditional supervised backbones across cities with different road topologies and driving conventions, particularly when transferring from right-side to left-side driving environments. Self-supervised representation learning reduces this gap. In open-loop evaluation, a supervised backbone exhibits severe inflation when transferring from Boston to Singapore (L2 displacement ratio 9.77x, collision ratio 19.43x), whereas domain-specific self-supervised pretraining reduces this to 1.20x and 0.75x respectively. In closed-loop evaluation, self-supervised pretraining improves PDMS by up to 4 percent for all single-city training cities. These results show that representation learning strongly influences the robustness of cross-city planning and establish zero-shot geographic transfer as a necessary test for evaluating end-to-end autonomous driving systems.

190. Deployment-Time Reliability of Learned Robot Policies FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Christopher Agia
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究如何通过运行时监控、数据驱动的策略可解释性和任务规划等机制，在部署时提高学习型机器人策略的可靠性，以应对分布偏移和复杂任务依赖等挑战。
摘要翻译

近年来，基于学习的机器人操作研究取得了显著进展，产生了具备卓越能力的策略。然而，部署时的可靠性仍然是实际应用中的一个根本性障碍，其中分布偏移、误差累积以及复杂的任务依赖性共同削弱了系统性能。本论文研究如何通过围绕学习策略运行的机制，在部署时提升学习型机器人策略的可靠性。我们开发了三类互补的部署时机制。首先，我们引入了运行时监控方法，通过识别闭环策略行为中的不一致性以及任务进展的偏差来检测即将发生的故障，而无需故障数据或针对特定任务的监督。其次，我们提出了一个以数据为中心的策略可解释性框架，该框架利用影响函数将部署时的成功与失败追溯到有影响力的训练演示数据，从而实现基于原理的诊断和数据集优化。第三，我们通过将策略协调问题表述为估计并最大化行为序列的成功概率，来解决可靠的长时程任务执行问题，并将此表述通过可行性感知的任务规划扩展到开放式、语言指定的任务。通过聚焦于部署的核心挑战，这些贡献为学习型机器人策略在现实世界中可靠应用奠定了实用基础。在这些基础上持续取得进展，对于未来实现可信赖且可扩展的机器人自主性至关重要。

Abstract

Recent advances in learning-based robot manipulation have produced policies with remarkable capabilities. Yet, reliability at deployment remains a fundamental barrier to real-world use, where distribution shift, compounding errors, and complex task dependencies collectively undermine system performance. This dissertation investigates how the reliability of learned robot policies can be improved at deployment time through mechanisms that operate around them. We develop three complementary classes of deployment-time mechanisms. First, we introduce runtime monitoring methods that detect impending failures by identifying inconsistencies in closed-loop policy behavior and deviations in task progress, without requiring failure data or task-specific supervision. Second, we propose a data-centric framework for policy interpretability that traces deployment-time successes and failures to influential training demonstrations using influence functions, enabling principled diagnosis and dataset curation. Third, we address reliable long-horizon task execution by formulating policy coordination as the problem of estimating and maximizing the success probability of behavior sequences, and we extend this formulation to open-ended, language-specified tasks through feasibility-aware task planning. By centering on core challenges of deployment, these contributions advance practical foundations for the reliable, real-world use of learned robot policies. Continued progress on these foundations will be essential for enabling trustworthy and scalable robot autonomy in the future.

191. Harnessing Data Asymmetry: Manifold Learning in the Finsler World FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Thomas Dagès, Simon Weber, Daniel Cremers, Ron Kimmel
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于Finsler几何的非对称流形学习方法，能够捕捉数据中的非对称信息，并在合成和真实数据集上证明了其比传统对称方法（如t-SNE、UMAP）能生成更高质量的嵌入表示。
摘要翻译

流形学习是数据分析和可视化的核心基础任务，其目标是通过在低维嵌入中保持成对相异性，捕捉复杂高维数据中潜在的简单结构。传统方法依赖于对称的黎曼几何，从而强制使用对称的相异性度量与嵌入空间（例如欧几里得空间）。然而，这种做法在实践中丢弃了数据样本非均匀性所固有的宝贵非对称信息。我们建议通过转向芬斯勒几何（Finsler geometry）——黎曼几何的一种非对称推广——来利用这种非对称性，并提出一种芬斯勒流形学习流程，该流程构建非对称相异性并嵌入到芬斯勒空间中。这极大地拓展了现有非对称嵌入方法的适用范围，使其从传统的定向数据延伸至任意数据类型。我们还通过将当前主流方法（如芬斯勒t-SNE和芬斯勒Umap）推广至非对称形式，实现了非对称嵌入方法的现代化。在受控合成数据集与大规模真实数据集上的实验表明，我们的非对称流程能够揭示传统流程中丢失的重要信息（例如密度层级结构），并且始终提供优于其欧几里得对应方法的嵌入质量。

Abstract

Manifold learning is a fundamental task at the core of data analysis and visualisation. It aims to capture the simple underlying structure of complex high-dimensional data by preserving pairwise dissimilarities in low-dimensional embeddings. Traditional methods rely on symmetric Riemannian geometry, thus forcing symmetric dissimilarities and embedding spaces, e.g. Euclidean. However, this discards in practice valuable asymmetric information inherent to the non-uniformity of data samples. We suggest to harness this asymmetry by switching to Finsler geometry, an asymmetric generalisation of Riemannian geometry, and propose a Finsler manifold learning pipeline that constructs asymmetric dissimilarities and embeds in a Finsler space. This greatly broadens the applicability of existing asymmetric embedders beyond traditionally directed data to any data. We also modernise asymmetric embedders by generalising current reference methods to asymmetry, like Finsler t-SNE and Finsler Umap. On controlled synthetic and large real datasets, we show that our asymmetric pipeline reveals valuable information lost in the traditional pipeline, e.g. density hierarchies, and consistently provides superior quality embeddings than their Euclidean counterparts.

192. Onset of Ergodicity Across Scales on a Digital Quantum Processor FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Faisal Alam, Marcos Crichigno, Elizabeth Crosson, Steven T. Flammia, Filippo Maria Gambetta, Max Hunter Gordon, Michael Kreshchuk, Ashley Montanaro, Alberto Nocera, Raul A. Santos
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该研究使用IBM超导量子处理器模拟二维无序海森堡模型，通过粗粒化空间斑块和碰撞熵测量，揭示了系统随耦合强度增加从亚遍历到遍历行为的平滑过渡，以及不同尺度斑块达到随机矩阵理论值的层次结构。
摘要翻译

理解孤立量子多体系统如何热化仍然是现代物理学的核心问题。我们利用IBM夜鹰超导处理器上的数字量子模拟，研究了二维无序海森堡弗洛凯模型中遍历性的出现，系统规模可达$10\times10$个量子比特。我们通过将系统粗粒化为不同尺寸的空间斑块，并引入一种基于每个斑块碰撞熵的度量，探测了不同长度尺度上的遍历性，从而能够详细研究遍历行为在何时跨越不同尺度出现。超导量子处理单元的高采样率，结合最优样本估计器，使我们能够研究尺寸高达$3\times3$的斑块。我们观察到，随着海森堡耦合强度$J$的增加，无噪声系统经历了从亚遍历行为到遍历行为的平滑过渡，其中较小斑块首先趋近其随机矩阵理论值，从而揭示了跨尺度的层次结构。在经典张量网络模拟可靠、即小斑块或小$J$值的参数空间区域内，我们发现量子模拟（经误差缓解后）与经典结果高度吻合。超出此区域，体积律纠缠和收缩复杂度的增长导致经典方法的计算成本急剧上升。我们的研究结果为利用量子计算机研究量子热化问题开辟了新方向。

Abstract

Understanding how isolated quantum many-body systems thermalize remains a central question in modern physics. We study the onset of ergodicity in a two-dimensional disordered Heisenberg Floquet model using digital quantum simulation on IBM's Nighthawk superconducting processor, reaching system sizes of up to $10\times10$ qubits. We probe ergodicity across different length scales by coarse-graining the system into spatial patches of varying sizes and introducing a measure based on the collision entropy of each patch, enabling a detailed study of when ergodic behavior emerges across scales. The high sampling rate of superconducting quantum processing units, together with an optimal sample estimator, allow us to access patches of sizes up to $3\times3$. We observe that as the Heisenberg coupling $J$ increases, the noiseless system undergoes a smooth crossover from subergodic to ergodic behavior, with smaller patches approaching their random-matrix-theory values first, thereby revealing a hierarchy across scales. In the region of parameter space where classical tensor-network simulations are reliable, small patches or small values of $J$, we find excellent agreement with the error-mitigated quantum simulation. Beyond this regime, volume-law entanglement and contraction complexity growth causes the cost of classical methods to rise sharply. Our results open new directions for the use of quantum computers in the study of quantum thermalization.

193. Transition from Statistical to Hardware-Limited Scaling in Photonic Quantum State Reconstruction FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Attila Baumann, Zsolt Kis, János Koltai, Gábor Vattay
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了在集成光子处理器上实现经典阴影层析时，由于硬件失真导致的误差饱和现象，发现了一个由硬件参数决定的“硬件地平线”精度界限，并提出了误差模型来区分静态相干失真和动态退相干机制。
摘要翻译

经典阴影层析的理论效率建立在完美的哈尔随机酉矩阵系综上，然而这一数学理想在近期硬件中仍无法物理实现。本文报道了我们在集成光子处理器上实验发现的一个基本精度界限：即“硬件地平线”，在该临界点处重构误差会发生急剧的相变。虽然误差初始遵循理论预测的统计标度律 $\mathcal{O}(M^{-1/2})$，但它会突然饱和于一个由所实现酉矩阵群的光谱畸变所决定的误差基底。通过推导一个唯象误差模型，我们解耦了静态相干光谱畸变与动态退相干这两种竞争机制，证明这一本征噪声基底构成了统计累积无法超越的硬性界限。这些发现表明，在NISQ（含噪声中等规模量子）硬件上应用阴影层析的效用，是由一个包含硬件参数的特定标度律所定义的，必须采用主动补偿策略来弥合理论纯性与集成光子学噪声现实之间的鸿沟。

Abstract

The theoretical efficiency of classical shadow tomography is predicated on a perfect Haar-random unitary ensemble, yet this mathematical ideal remains physically unattainable in near-term hardware. Here, we report the experimental discovery of a fundamental accuracy bound on integrated photonic processors: a ``Hardware Horizon'' where the reconstruction error undergoes a sharp phase transition. While the error initially obeys the predicted statistical scaling $\mathcal{O}(M^{-1/2})$, it abruptly saturates at a floor determined by the spectral distortions of the realized unitary group. By deriving a phenomenological error model, we decouple the competing mechanisms of static coherent spectral distortion and dynamic decoherence, demonstrating that this intrinsic noise floor imposes a hard bound that statistical accumulation cannot overcome. These findings establish that the utility of shadow tomography on NISQ (noisy intermediate-scale quantum) hardware is defined by a specific scaling law involving hardware parameters, necessitating active compensation strategies to bridge the gap between theoretical purity and the noisy reality of integrated photonics.

194. Thermalisation as Diffusion in Hilbert Space FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Aleksey Lunkin
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了量子热化过程的微观理论，通过将相互作用矩阵元素建模为随机变量，推导出约化动力学的扩散传播子表达式，并预测了由典型能级展宽倒数决定的热化时间尺度，在多个模型中的精确对角化测试验证了理论预测。
摘要翻译

我们提出了一种超越标准马尔可夫近似与费米黄金定则假设的微观热化理论，用于描述与多体热库耦合的温度计系统。通过在非相互作用基中将相互作用矩阵元建模为独立随机变量，我们推导出约化动力学的扩散传播子表达式，并证明弛豫过程由相互作用引起的能级展宽分布所主导。该理论预测热化时间尺度由典型展宽宽度的倒数决定，并给出了全局细致平衡条件的非马尔可夫推广形式。通过对重尾Lévy耦合、全连接横向场伊辛模型以及一维Imbrie模型进行的精确对角化数值检验，结果均与理论预测高度吻合。

Abstract

We develop a microscopic theory of thermalisation for a thermometer coupled to a many-body bath beyond standard Markovian and Fermi-golden-rule assumptions. By modeling interaction matrix elements in the non-interacting basis as independent random variables, we derive a diffusion-propagator expression for the reduced dynamics and show that relaxation is controlled by the distribution of interaction-induced level broadenings. The theory predicts a thermalisation timescale set by the inverse typical broadening and yields a non-Markovian generalization of global balance. Exact-diagonalization tests for heavy-tailed L{é}vy couplings, an all-to-all transverse-field Ising model, and the one-dimensional Imbrie model show good agreement with these predictions.

195. Sparse Phase Ansatzes for Resource-Efficient Qudit State Preparation via the SNAP-Displacement Protocol FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Maurizio Ferrari Dacrema, Doğa Murat Kürkçüoğlu, Andy C. Y. Li, Tanay Roy, Silvia Zorzetti
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文针对玻色子量子态制备中的资源效率问题，提出了稀疏相位拟设方法，通过优化SNAP位移协议中的相位子集，在理想和噪声环境下均能减少所需相位数量并实现更高效的量子态制备。
摘要翻译

高效制备非经典玻色子态是量子计算、模拟及精密计量领域的核心需求。本研究探讨了在玻色子qudit系统中利用SNAP位移协议实现资源高效的量子态制备。现有基于SNAP位移的方法通常需要大量门操作和SNAP相位，导致控制脉冲复杂、拟设时长增加，并放大了光子损耗与控制误差的影响。本文聚焦于近中期应用场景，其中含噪声量子设备对可实现的保真度存在制约，这一因素必须纳入考量。具体而言，我们提出仅优化SNAP相位的一个子集，并引入三种渐进式稀疏拟设架构。为实现细粒度控制并为特定目标保真度选择最合适的拟设，我们进一步采用标量化多目标优化方法，在保真度与相位数量或拟设时长之间进行权衡。针对多种目标态及维度高达$d=64$的qudit系统的数值模拟结果表明：在理想与含噪声环境下，相较于全参数化SNAP位移协议，这些稀疏拟设均能实现更优的权衡效果——在持续减少所需相位数量的同时，为近中期玻色子态的高效制备提供了切实可行的技术路径。

Abstract

Efficient preparation of nonclassical bosonic states is a central requirement for quantum computing, simulation, and precision metrology. We study resource-efficient quantum state preparation in bosonic qudit systems using the SNAP-displacement (SD) protocol. Existing SD-based approaches typically require a large number of gates and SNAP phases, resulting in complex control pulses, increasing the ansatz duration, and amplifying the impact of photon-loss and control errors. In this work, we focus on the near- to medium-term regime, in which noisy quantum devices impose trade-offs on the fidelity that can be achieved, which must be taken into account. Specifically, we propose to optimize only a subset of the SNAP phases and introduce three progressively more general sparse ansatzes. To provide fine-grained control and identify the most suitable ansatz for a given target fidelity, we further employ a scalarized multi-objective optimization that trades off fidelity against either the number of phases or the duration of the ansatz. Numerical results for several target states and qudit dimensions up to $d=64$ show that these sparse ansatzes achieve favorable trade-offs compared to the fully parameterized SD protocol in both ideal and noisy settings, consistently reducing the number of required phases and suggesting a practical route to more efficient near- and medium-term bosonic state preparation.

196. Commutation Groups and State-Independent Contextuality FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Samson Abramsky, Serban-Ion Cercelescu, Carmen-Maria Constantin
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了量子计算中的状态无关上下文性，通过引入交换群（commutation groups）和上下文词（contextual words）来分析和表征这种量子非经典性，并给出了交换群的酉表示。
摘要翻译

我们引入一种用于研究状态无关语境性论证的代数结构，这是一种以著名的佩雷斯-默明魔术方为例证的关键量子非经典性形式，并被用作量子优势的来源。我们提出了由生成元与关系定义的**对易群**，并通过字符串重写系统对其进行分析。同时给出一种线性代数构造，即海森堡群的有向化版本。我们引入**语境性词语**作为语境性见证的一般形式。我们刻画了对易群中语境性词语出现的条件，并在其他情形下显式构造了非语境性赋值方案。我们还给出了对易群作为广义泡利$n$群的子群的酉表示。

Abstract

We introduce an algebraic structure for studying state-independent contextuality arguments, a key form of quantum non-classicality exemplified by the well-known Peres-Mermin magic square, and used as a source of quantum advantage. We introduce \emph{commutation groups} presented by generators and relations, and analyse them in terms of a string rewriting system. There is also a linear algebraic construction, a directed version of the Heisenberg group. We introduce \emph{contextual words} as a general form of contextuality witness. We characterise when contextual words can arise in commutation groups, and explicitly construct non-contextual value assignments in other cases. We give unitary representations of commutation groups as subgroups of generalized Pauli $n$-groups.

197. Optimal Discrimination of Gaussian States by Gaussian Measurements FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Leah Turner, Ludovico Lami, Madalin Guta, Gerardo Adesso
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了高斯测量是否足以区分高斯态的问题，通过使用最大相对熵作为可区分性度量，推导出基于协方差矩阵的条件来确定是否存在最优高斯测量，并展示了当条件不满足时高斯测量与无约束测量之间存在可区分性差距。
摘要翻译

高斯测量是否足以区分高斯态？本文通过聚焦于最大相对熵这一操作可区分性度量来探讨该问题。针对两个一般的多模高斯态，我们基于其协方差矩阵推导出一个条件，该条件完全决定了是否存在能够达到最大相对熵的最优高斯测量。当条件满足时，我们明确给出了这一最优测量方案；当条件不满足时，高斯测量所能实现的区分度与允许所有测量的无约束最大相对熵之间存在严格差距。我们在单模场景中展示了研究结果，并给出了该差距可任意增大的态实例，从而揭示了高斯数据隐藏（Gaussian data hiding）的新案例。

Abstract

Are Gaussian measurements enough to distinguish between Gaussian states? Here, we tackle this question by focusing on the max-relative entropy as an operational distinguishability metric. Given two general multimode Gaussian states, we derive a condition, based on their covariance matrices, that completely determines whether or not there exists an optimal Gaussian measurement achieving the max-relative entropy. When the condition is satisfied, we find this optimal measurement explicitly. When the condition is not met, there is a strict gap between the distinguishability achievable by Gaussian measurements and the unconstrained max-relative entropy in which all measurements are allowed. We illustrate our results in the single-mode setting, and show examples of states for which this gap can be made arbitrarily large, revealing novel instances of Gaussian data hiding.

198. Frequency Comb Behavior of Time Crystals in an RF-Driven Dissipative Rydberg System FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Dixith Manchaiah, William J. Watterson, Christopher L. Holloway
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该研究在强相互作用铯里德堡蒸气中实现了射频驱动的耗散时间晶体，观察到了频率梳谱等非线性现象，并通过四能级平均场模型和经典范德波尔振荡器模拟定量解释了实验结果。
摘要翻译

受驱非线性振荡器是理解非平衡系统中同步、频率牵引及频率梳形成的普适范式。本文在强相互作用的铯里德伯原子蒸气中实现了此类涌现的非线性振荡器，其中相干光激发、耗散与长程相互作用共同催生出具有本征振荡频率的驱动耗散时间晶体相。施加射频场可实现对本征振荡频率的可控调谐。在射频外差条件下，我们观测到原子相干中的互调制、频率牵引现象，并在强驱动下观察到梳状光谱的涌现。我们采用四能级平均场模型定量描述了这些观测结果，并通过受驱范德波尔振荡器展示了其经典类比。本研究确立了相互作用的里德伯原子系综作为可调谐平台，用于探索多体原子系统中的非平衡时间晶体序、非线性同步及频率梳生成。

Abstract

Driven nonlinear oscillators constitute a universal paradigm for understanding synchronization, frequency pulling, and frequency comb formation in nonequilibrium systems. Here, we realize such an emergent nonlinear oscillator in strongly interacting cesium Rydberg vapor, where coherent optical excitation, dissipation, and long-range interactions give rise to a driven-dissipative time crystal phase with intrinsic oscillation frequencies. Applying a radio-frequency (RF) field allows controlled tuning of the intrinsic oscillation frequency. Under RF heterodyne conditions, we observe intermodulation, frequency pulling, and, at strong drive, the emergence of a comb-like spectrum in the atomic coherence. We quantitatively capture these observations using a four-level mean-field model and demonstrate a classical analogue with a driven Van der Pol oscillator. Our results establish interacting Rydberg ensembles as a tunable platform for exploring nonequilibrium time-crystalline order, nonlinear synchronization, and frequency comb generation in many-body atomic systems.

199. Optimal control with flag qubits FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Liang-Xu Xie, Lui Zuccherelli de Paula, Weizhou Cai, Qing-Xuan Jie, Luyan Sun, Chang-Ling Zou, Guang-Can Guo, Zi-Jie Chen, Xu-Bo Zou
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于标志辅助量子比特的最优控制框架（Flag-GRAPE算法），能够主动调控量子系统的噪声结构，在超导量子电路中实现了比传统方法降低51%保真度误差的性能提升，并为量子纠错提供了兼容性。
摘要翻译

高保真度量子操作是容错量子计算的基石。在开放量子系统中，传统最优控制仅被动抵抗退相干，使得环境引发的不确定性成为性能的基本瓶颈。为克服此限制，我们提出一种结合标志辅助量子比特的新型最优控制框架及Flag-GRAPE算法，能够主动调控系统的噪声结构。通过将后选择直接嵌入目标函数，Flag-GRAPE使退相干误差与辅助量子比特的异常态相关联。后续测量与后选择可有效排除此类不确定性，从而突破传统控制的保真度极限。在超导量子电路中的数值模拟表明，相较于传统封闭系统脉冲，该方案将保真度损失降低51%，且此种增强在广泛噪声范围内保持稳健。此外，通过主动将非结构化退相干转化为可预警的擦除错误，Flag-GRAPE天然兼容量子纠错（QEC）。我们通过初始化逻辑猫态验证了该特性，表明Flag-GRAPE与QEC的结合能直接提升态制备性能。此新框架可降低容错架构的硬件开销，并为近期实验中实现逻辑态制备增益开辟可行路径。

Abstract

High-fidelity quantum operations are the cornerstone of fault-tolerant quantum computation. In open quantum systems, traditional optimal control only passively resists decoherence, leaving environment-induced uncertainty as a fundamental performance bottleneck. To overcome this, we propose a new optimal control framework with flag ancillas and the Flag-GRAPE algorithm, which can actively tailor the system's noise structure. Through embedding post-selection directly into the objective function, Flag-GRAPE correlates decoherence errors with the ancilla's unexpected state. Subsequent measurement and post-selection effectively expel this uncertainty, circumventing the fidelity bounds of traditional control. Numerical simulations in a superconducting quantum circuit demonstrate a $51\%$ reduction in infidelity compared to traditional closed-system pulses and also show that such enhancement is robust across broad noise regimes. Furthermore, by actively converting unstructured decoherence into heralded erasure errors, Flag-GRAPE is inherently compatible with quantum error correction. We demonstrate this by initializing a logical cat-code state, showing that the combination between Flag-GRAPE and QEC yields immediate state preparation enhancements. This new framework can reduce hardware overhead for fault-tolerant architectures and open up a practical path toward logical state preparation gain in near-term experiments.

200. Quantum lower bounds for simulating fluid dynamics FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Abtin Ameri, Joseph Carolan, Andrew M. Childs, Hari Krovi
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了量子计算机模拟流体动力学（KdV方程和欧拉方程）的性能下界，证明量子算法无法显著超越经典模拟方法。
摘要翻译

开发用于模拟流体动力学的量子算法已成为一个活跃的研究领域，因为加速流体模拟可能对工业界和基础科学产生重大影响。尽管已有多种在量子计算机上模拟流体动力学的方法被提出，但这些算法是否能在现有经典方法基础上实现加速在很大程度上仍不明确。本文提供证据表明，量子计算机通常无法显著超越流体动力学的经典模拟。我们研究了两种流体模型：描述浅水波的Korteweg-de Vries（KdV）方程，以及描述理想无粘性流体的不可压缩欧拉方程。我们证明，在最坏情况下，任何模拟KdV方程或欧拉方程时间$T$的量子算法分别需要初始态的$Ω(T^2)$和$e^{Ω(T)}$个副本。这些下界适用于制备最终态的任务，类似下界也适用于历史态制备。我们通过研究孤立子的发散性证明了KdV方程的下界。对于欧拉方程，我们证明了不稳定性能够实现快速态区分。

Abstract

Developing quantum algorithms to simulate fluid dynamics has become an active area of research, as accelerating fluid simulations could have significant impact in both industry and fundamental science. While many approaches have been proposed for simulating fluid dynamics on quantum computers, it is largely unclear whether these algorithms will provide speedup over existing classical approaches. In this paper we give evidence that quantum computers cannot significantly outperform classical simulations of fluid dynamics in general. We study two models of fluids: the Korteweg-de Vries (KdV) equation, which models shallow water waves, and the incompressible Euler equations, which model ideal, inviscid fluids. We show that any quantum algorithm simulating the KdV equation or the Euler equations for time $T$ requires $Ω(T^2)$ and $e^{Ω(T)}$ copies of the initial state in the worst case, respectively. These lower bounds hold for the task of preparing the final state, and similar bounds hold for history state preparation. We prove the lower bound for the KdV equation by investigating divergence of solitons. For the Euler equations, we show that instabilities enable fast state discrimination.

201. Raman relaxation in Yb(III) molecular qubits: non-trivial correlations between spin-phonon coupling and molecular structure FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Giacomo Sansone, Lorenzo A. Mariano, Stefano Carretta, Paolo Santini, Alessandro Lunghi
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该研究通过第一性原理计算揭示了Yb(III)分子量子比特中自旋-声子弛豫的拉曼过程机制，发现分子结构变化对自旋-声子耦合的影响复杂且难以用简单化学相关性解释，为分子量子比特的化学设计提供了新见解。
摘要翻译

镱(III)的配位配合物在4f化合物中展现出最长的自旋相干时间之一，这使其成为分子量子技术领域极具前景的平台。尽管即使在低温下，自旋-声子弛豫仍然是相干时间的限制因素，但通过化学设计对其进行调控，有望推动这些自旋量子比特原型突破当前极限。为了深入探究如何从化学层面调控自旋-声子弛豫，本文对三种镱(III)分子进行了完整的从头算研究，这些分子具有微小的化学差异，却表现出显著不同的自旋弛豫时间。结果表明，低温弛豫主要由一小群高度离域的低能声子所触发的拉曼过程主导。对这些贡献的分析表明，超越第一配位壳层的分子结构修饰对自旋-声子耦合的调控本质上高度复杂，难以用简单的化学术语进行合理化解释。这些发现呼吁在概念上实现转变：不应再试图使用简单的磁结构相关性来解释分子结构修饰对自旋-声子弛豫的影响，而应将预测性第一性原理框架视为未来化学设计策略的潜在驱动力。

Abstract

The coordination complexes of Yb(III) exhibit some of the longest spin coherence times among 4f compounds, making them a promising platform for molecular quantum technologies. While spin-phonon relaxation remains a limiting factor for coherence times even at low temperature, its control through chemical design has the potential to push these spin qubits prototypes beyond current limits. With the aim of providing insights on how to chemically control spin-phonon relaxation, we here present a full ab initio study of spin-phonon dynamics for three Yb(III) molecules exhibiting minimal chemical differences, yet quantitatively different spin relaxation times. Results show that low-temperature relaxation is governed by Raman processes triggered by a small group of largely delocalized low-energy phonons. The analysis of these contributions highlights that the modulation of spin-phonon coupling by molecular structure modifications beyond the first coordination shell are highly non-trivial in nature and hard to rationalize in simple chemical terms. These findings call for a conceptual step change from the attempt to use simple magneto-structural correlations to interpret the effect of molecular structural modifications on spin-phonon relaxation, and present predictive first-principles frameworks as a potential driving force of future chemical design strategies

202. The Constrained Origin of Canonical and Microcanonical Ensembles in Quantum Theory FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Loris Di Cairano
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了量子理论中正则系综和微正则系综的起源问题，通过引入扩展希尔伯特空间和约束算子，证明了这两种统计系综可以从同一个约束量子动力学中统一推导出来。
摘要翻译

在量子理论中，平衡统计力学通常通过正则系综来表述，其特殊地位与时间演化的欧几里得延拓密切相关。相比之下，微正则系综通常作为一种独立的光谱构造被引入。本研究表明，这种不对称性是表象性的而非结构性的。我们在一个扩展的希尔伯特空间中构建系统，其中时间被提升为一个辅助的时钟自由度，而物理态通过一个重参数化不变的约束算符 $\hat C = \hat P_T + \hat H$ 进行选择。对应的投影算符 $δ(\hat C)$ 提供了一个单一的统一对象，正则系综与微正则系综均作为时钟分量的互补投影从中涌现。在时钟时间表象中，纯虚的时钟间隔产生了欧几里得核与正则配分函数。在共轭的时钟能量表象中，同一投影算符约化为光谱算符 $δ(\hat H-E)$，从而得到微正则态密度。其主要结果是结构性的：正则统计与微正则统计无需作为独立构造引入，因为二者均已编码在同一约束量子动力学之中。

Abstract

In quantum theory, equilibrium statistical mechanics is usually formulated through the canonical ensemble, whose privileged status is tied to the Euclidean continuation of time evolution. The microcanonical ensemble, by contrast, is commonly introduced as a separate spectral construction. In this work we show that this asymmetry is representational rather than structural. We formulate the system in an extended Hilbert space in which time is promoted to an auxiliary clock degree of freedom and physical states are selected by a reparametrization-invariant constraint operator $\hat C = \hat P_T + \hat H$. The corresponding projector $δ(\hat C)$ provides a single unified object from which both canonical and microcanonical ensembles emerge as complementary projections in the clock sector. In the clock-time representation, a purely imaginary clock separation yields the Euclidean kernel and the canonical partition function. In the conjugate clock-energy representation, the same projector reduces to the spectral operator $δ(\hat H-E)$ and hence to the microcanonical density of states. The main consequence is structural: canonical and microcanonical statistics need not be introduced as independent constructions, since both are already encoded in the same constrained quantum dynamics.

203. History state formalism for time series with application to finance FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: F. Lomoc, N. Canosa, A. P. Boette, R. Rossignoli
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文将量子力学中的历史态形式主义应用于金融时间序列分析，通过量子相干态嵌入和系统-时间纠缠熵来表征时间序列演化，并推导出基于纠缠的波动率指标。
摘要翻译

我们提出一种通过采用量子力学历史态形式体系来分析一般时间序列的方法。该形式体系允许我们基于单一量子态——历史态——来描述完整演化过程，该态同时将参考时钟也作为量子系统包含在内。它自然引出了系统-时间纠缠的概念，其衍生的纠缠熵构成了衡量历史中所访问有效可区分态数量的度量。通过对时间序列数据进行量子相干态嵌入，我们可以将量子历史态与序列相关联。这些相干态之间的高斯重叠从而提供了序列数据间可区分性的平滑度量。相应重叠矩阵的特征值实际上决定了历史态的纠缠谱与纠缠熵，这为演化过程提供了严格的表征。作为示例，该形式体系被应用于典型金融时间序列数据。通过纠缠熵与纠缠谱，可以识别不同的演化状态。基于纠缠的波动率指标也被推导出来，并与标准波动率度量进行了比较。

Abstract

We present a method for analyzing general time series by employing the history state formalism of quantum mechanics. This formalism allows us to describe a complete evolution based on a single quantum state, the history state, which simultaneously includes -also as a quantum system- the reference clock. It naturally leads to the concept of system-time entanglement, with the ensuing entanglement entropy constituting a measure of the effective number of distinguishable states visited in the history. Through a quantum coherent state embedding of the time series data, it is then possible to associate a quantum history state to the series. The gaussian overlap between these coherent states provides thus a smooth measure of distinguishability between the series data. The eigenvalues of the corresponding overlap matrix determine in fact the entanglement spectrum and entropy of the history state, which provide a rigorous characterization of the evolution. As illustration, the formalism is applied to typical financial time-series data. Through the entanglement entropy and spectrum, different evolution regimes can be identified. Entanglement based volatility indicators are also derived, and compared with standard volatility measures.

204. Entanglement cost of bipartite quantum channel discrimination under positive partial transpose operations FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Chengkai Zhu, Shuyu He, Gereon Koßmann, Xin Wang
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了在正偏转置操作下，区分双边量子信道所需的最小纠缠成本，并提出了可数值计算的半定规划方法。
摘要翻译

量子信道区分是量子信息处理中的一项基本任务。在单次操作场景下，两个候选信道之间的区分由钻石范数表征。然而，在这一基础设定之外，分布式量子信息处理中的许多场景仍未得到解决，这促使我们引入能够反映可用资源能力的可区分性概念。本文构建了一种用于二分信道区分的测试器理论，由此引出二分信道区分的纠缠代价概念：即局部协议为达到全局最优成功概率所需共享最大纠缠态的最小施密特秩$k$。我们引入$k$-可注入测试器作为基于测试器的纠缠辅助局部区分描述，并特别研究了$k$-可注入正部分转置（PPT）测试器类，该类构成了实际相关的LOCC测试器类在数值上可处理的松弛形式。 针对每个$k$，我们推导了最优成功概率的半定规划（SDP），进而得到一种可高效计算的单次PPT纠缠代价。为使这些优化问题在数值上可行，我们证明了协变信道对的对称性约简原理，从而降低了相关SDP的有效维度。最后，通过对SDP进行对偶化，我们推导了复合信道区分问题的界，并基于退极化信道、退极化SWAP信道以及Werner-Holevo信道给出了原理验证示例以说明本框架。

Abstract

Quantum channel discrimination is a fundamental task in quantum information processing. In the one-shot regime, discrimination between two candidate channels is characterized by the diamond norm. Beyond this basic setting, however, many scenarios in distributed quantum information processing remain unresolved, motivating notions of distinguishability that capture the power of the available resources. In this work, we formulate a theory of testers for bipartite channel discrimination, leading to the concept of the entanglement cost of bipartite channel discrimination: the minimum Schmidt rank $k$ of a shared maximally entangled state required for local protocols to achieve the globally optimal success probability. We introduce $k$-injectable testers as a tester-based description of entanglement-assisted local discrimination and, in particular, study the class of $k$-injectable positive-partial-transpose (PPT) testers, which constitutes a numerically tractable relaxation of the practically relevant class of LOCC testers. For every $k$, we derive a semidefinite program (SDP) for the optimal success probability, which in turn yields an efficiently computable one-shot PPT entanglement cost. To render these optimization problems numerically feasible, we prove a symmetry-reduction principle for covariant channel pairs, thereby reducing the effective dimension of the associated SDPs. Finally, by dualizing the SDP, we derive bounds on the composite channel-discrimination problem and illustrate our framework with proof-of-principle examples based on the depolarizing channel, the depolarized SWAP channel, and the Werner--Holevo channels.

205. The Geometry of Clifford Algorithms: Bernstein-Vazirani as Classical Computation in a Rotated Basis FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Bartosz Chmura
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文重新解释了Bernstein-Vazirani量子算法，提出一个几何框架将其视为经典线性计算在旋转基下的实现，并建立了量子电路的教学分类体系。
摘要翻译

伯恩斯坦-瓦齐拉尼（Bernstein-Vazirani, BV）算法常被作为量子并行性的典型示例进行教学，然而基于干涉的标准解释往往掩盖了其内在的简洁性。本文提出一种几何重构视角，将哈达玛（Hadamard）门的“包裹”操作视为全局基旋转而非计算复杂性的生成器。这一视角揭示出，该算法本质上是在共轭傅里叶基下对GF(2)域进行的经典线性计算，其表面上的并行性源于坐标变换。基于默明（Mermin）早先提出的教学简化方案——该方案给出了等价的“经典”电路但未明确将其标定为经典计算——我们将其提升为形式化的几何框架。在扩展部分，我们区分了全局旋转电路（我们揭示其为经典线性计算）与产生量子纠缠的拓扑扭转电路。我们提出了一种教学分类法，区分（1）纯计算基电路，（2）全局旋转电路（以伯恩斯坦-瓦齐拉尼算法为例），以及（3）涉及非对齐子系统基的拓扑扭转电路。该框架使得能够从新角度审视戈特斯曼-克尼尔（Gottesman-Knill）定理，并拓展学生对相位回踢（phase kickback）与“反弹特性”（Ricochet Property）的理解。此外，通过适用于本科量子信息课程的具体电路推导与Qiskit模拟，该框架为解释贝尔对扩展提供了更直观的起点。展望部分探讨了这一几何视角如何为将纠缠理解为拓扑扭转铺平道路。

Abstract

The Bernstein-Vazirani (BV) algorithm is frequently taught as a canonical example of quantum parallelism, yet the standard interference-based explanation often obscures its underlying simplicity. We present a geometric reframing in which the Hadamard gate "wrapping" acts as a global basis rotation rather than a generator of computational complexity. This perspective reveals that the algorithm is effectively a classical linear computation over GF(2) performed in the conjugate Fourier basis, with the apparent parallelism arising from coordinate transformation. Building on Mermin's earlier pedagogical shortcut, which presented a 'classical' circuit equivalent but stopped short of explicitly labeling it as such, we elevate this to a formal geometric framework. In the extension, we distinguish between globally rotated circuits--which we reveal as classical linear computations--and topologically twisted circuits that generate quantum entanglement. We introduce a pedagogical taxonomy distinguishing (1) pure computational-basis circuits, (2) globally rotated circuits (exemplified by Bernstein-Vazirani), and (3) topologically twisted circuits involving non-aligned subsystem bases. This framework allows viewing the Gottesman-Knill theorem from a new angle, extends students' understanding of phase kickback and the 'Ricochet Property'. Furthermore, it provides a more intuitive starting point for explaining Bell-pair extensions through concrete circuit derivations and Qiskit simulations suitable for undergraduate quantum information courses. The outlook explores how this geometric view paves the way for understanding entanglement as topological twists.

206. Measurement-Induced State transitions in Inductively-Shunted Transmons FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Nicholas Zobrist, John Mark Kreikebaum, Mostafa Khezri, Sergei V. Isakov, Brian J. Lester, Yaxing Zhang, Agustin Di Paolo, Daniel Sank, W. Clarke Smith
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了超导量子比特中测量诱导状态跃迁的问题，并通过在transmon中添加电感分流来消除偏移电荷依赖性并稳定MIST，实验验证了量子模型和半经典模型的一致性。
摘要翻译

快速且高保真的量子比特测量在量子纠错中起着关键作用。在超导量子比特中，测量通常通过对与量子比特发生色散耦合的读取谐振腔施加共振微波驱动来实现。更短的测量时间需要在读取谐振腔中占据更多光子数，这最终会导致不期望的测量诱导态跃迁（MIST）。MIST可能尤其成问题，因为这些跃迁常使量子比特处于高能态，且MIST在读取参数空间中的位置会随量子比特偏置电荷的变化而发生漂移。在传输子量子比特中，以往通过采用极大的量子比特-谐振腔失谐或专用的偏置电荷调控来避免这些漂移。在本工作中，我们采用一种不同的方法，为传输子添加一个电感分流器，以消除偏置电荷依赖性并稳定MIST。我们通过实验在几种不同的电感分流传输子中表征了MIST，结果与MIST的量子及半经典模型相符。这些结论可推广至其他电感分流量子比特。

Abstract

Fast and high-fidelity qubit measurement plays a key role in quantum error correction. In superconducting qubits, measurement is typically performed using a resonant microwave drive on a readout resonator dispersively coupled to the qubit. Shorter measurement times require larger numbers of photons populating the readout resonator, which ultimately leads to undesired measurementinduced state transitions (MIST) of the qubit. MIST can be particularly problematic because these transitions often leave the qubit in a high energy state, and the MIST locations in readout parameter space drift as a function of qubit offset charge. In transmon qubits, these drifts have been avoided using very large qubit-resonator detunings or dedicated offset charge biases. In this work, we take an alternative approach and add an inductive shunt to the transmon to eliminate the offset charge dependence and stabilize the MIST. We experimentally characterize MIST in several different inductively-shunted transmons, in agreement with quantum and semiclassical models for MIST. These results extend to other inductively-shunted qubits.

207. Climbing the Clifford Hierarchy FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Luca Bastioni, Samuel Glandon, Tefjol Pllaha, Madison Stewart, Phillip Waitkevich
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了量子计算中Clifford层级结构的攀登问题，特别是完全刻画了那些平方根能攀升至第三层的Clifford门。
摘要翻译

克利福德层级因其与容错量子计算、魔幻态蒸馏等的紧密联系，一直是量子计算领域的核心课题。然而，目前仅部分层级得到了充分理解，例如对角门和第三层级门。层级的对角部分可以通过取平方根和添加控制操作来逐级攀升。类似地，泡利门（第一层级）的平方根是克利福德门（攀升至第二层级）。基于这一思路，我们研究了其平方根能攀升至下一层级的量子门。具体而言，我们完整刻画了那些平方根能攀升至第三层级的克利福德门。

Abstract

The Clifford Hierarchy has been a central topic in quantum computation due to its strong connections with fault-tolerant quantum computation, magic state distillation, and more. Nevertheless, only sections of the hierarchy are fully understood, such as diagonal gates and third level gates. The diagonal part of the hierarchy can be climbed by taking square roots and adding controls. Similarly, square roots of Pauli gates (first level) are Clifford gates (climb to the second level). Based on this theme, we study gates whose square roots climb to the next level. In particular, we fully characterize Clifford gates whose square roots climb to the third level.

208. Operationalism, Causality, and Quantum Theory: a mostly time symmetric perspective FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Lucien Hardy
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 本书从时间对称的视角系统构建了操作概率理论和操作量子理论，证明了简单情况下的时间对称与时间前向视角等价，并发展了用于复杂因果结构的希尔伯特对象图表示法。
摘要翻译

这是一本关于操作概率理论的著作。此类理论通常采用时间正向视角，而本书则主要采用时间对称视角。这带来一个定位问题：本书是否仅是探讨时间对称性的小众专著？并非如此。这是一部关于操作概率理论的全面论著，只是主要从时间对称视角展开。实际上，本书包含两部分内容：（1）针对具有简单因果结构（所有输入先于所有输出）的简单操作的简明论述；（2）针对可能具有复杂因果结构（复杂操作配备因果图）的复杂操作的深入探讨。对于简单情形，我们证明了时间对称视角与时间正向视角的等价性。在两部分论述中，我们分别建立了：（A）基于操作的操作概率理论（OPT）；（B）基于与操作相对应的算子张量的操作量子理论（OQT）；（C）可通过倍增生成算子张量的希尔伯特对象理论。我们要求操作必须具有物理实在性，这保证了由操作构建的电路其概率值介于0到1之间，且满足特定的因果条件。我们证明了当操作相互连接时，所形成的网络同样具有物理实在性。我们使用复杂操作对索金不可能测量进行建模，并证明物理实在性可防止异常信号传递。我们为希尔伯特对象发展了图示符号体系，包括用于倍增的镜像算子及镜像定理。利用此框架，我们针对各类因果图证明了时间对称因果膨胀定理。

Abstract

This is a book about operational probabilistic theories. The standard approach in such theories is from a time forward perspective. In this book we mostly take a time symmetric perspective. This presents a branding problem. Is this a niche book merely about time symmetry? No. This is a comprehensive book about operational probabilistic theories, but mostly from a time symmetric perspective. In fact, this book consists of (1) a simple book about simple operations having simple causal structure (where all the inputs are before all the outputs), and (2) a complex book about complex operations that can have complicated causal structure (a complex operation is equipped with a causal diagram). For the simple case we are able to show that the time symmetric perspective is equivalent to the time forward perspective. In each book we set up (A) operational probabilistic theories (OPTs) in terms of operations, (B) Operational Quantum Theory (OQT) in terms of operator tensors which correspond to operations, and (C) the theory of Hilbert objects which can be doubled up to give operator tensors. Operations are required to be physical which guarantees that circuits built out of operations have probabilities between 0 and 1 and that certain causality conditions are met. We prove that when we wire together operations the resulting networks are also physical. We model Sorkin's impossible measurements with complex operations and show that physicality prevents anomalous signalling. We develop diagrammatic notation for Hilbert objects. This includes mirrors for doubling up and mirror theorems. We use this framework to prove time symmetric causal dilation theorems for various causal diagrams.

209. Critical Unstable Qubits in Particle Physics FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Dimitrios Karamitros, Thomas McKelvey, Snehit Panghal, Apostolos Pilaftsis
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了不稳定两能级量子系统的动力学，发现当能量级和衰变宽度矢量正交时会出现临界行为，并应用于中性介子系统推导了新的可观测量的上限。
摘要翻译

我们通过采用布洛赫矢量表示法，详细研究了不稳定两能级量子系统的动力学。我们发现了一类新的临界情形，其中所谓的能级矢量 ${\bf E}$ 与衰变宽度矢量 ${\bfΓ}$ 彼此正交，且参数 $r = |{\bf Γ}|/(2|{\bf E}|)$ 小于~1。最值得注意的是，我们发现当在系统适当定义的共衰变（co-decaying）参考系中分析时，临界不稳定量子比特（CUQ）系统表现出非典型行为，如相干—退相干振荡。通过利用傅里叶级数分解，我们定义了非谐性观测量，用以量化临界不稳定量子比特非正弦振荡的程度。我们将该形式体系的结果应用于中性介子系统，并推导了这些新观测量的普适上限。特别地，我们以布洛赫球参数的形式，编制了一份所有已深入研究的介子—反介子两能级系统的汇总表。

Abstract

We study in detail the dynamics of unstable two-level quantum systems by adopting the Bloch-vector representation. We identify a novel class of critical scenarios in which the so-called energy-level and decay-width vectors, ${\bf E}$ and ${\bfΓ}$, are orthogonal to one another, and the parameter $r = |{\bf Γ}|/(2|{\bf E}|)$ is less than~1. Most remarkably, we find that critical unstable qubit systems exhibit atypical behaviours like coherence--decoherence oscillations when analysed in an appropriately defined co-decaying frame of the system. By making use of a Fourier series decomposition, we define anharmonicity observables that quantify the degree of non-sinusoidal oscillation of a CUQ. We apply the results of our formalism to the neutral-meson systems and derive generic upper limits on these new observables. In particular, we provide a compilation table of all well-explored meson--antimeson two-level systems in terms of Bloch-sphere parameters.
