210. Noise Correlations as a Resource in Pauli-Twirled Circuits FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Antoine Brillant, Rohan N Rajmohan, Peter Groszkowski, Alireza Seif, Jens Koch, Aashish Clerk
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了量子电路中噪声相关性对随机编译后电路保真度的影响，发现相关性可以提高保真度并抑制量子噪声成分。
摘要翻译

随机编译是一种成熟的工具，可将任意量子噪声通道定制为泡利误差。然而，在随机编译电路中，空间和时间噪声关联的影响尚未被完全理解。本文表明，对于一大类关联高斯噪声，随机编译能同时降低噪声的强度和时间关联范围。对于克利福德电路，我们推导出了随机编译电路保真度的简明解析表达式。令人惊讶的是，我们发现这种保真度总是随着关联的存在而提高，这表明关联在随机编译电路中是一种资源。在系统-环境耦合的主导阶下，我们还证明了随机编译抑制了环境关联的量子分量，这意味着人们可以安全地将弱噪声视为经典噪声。最后，通过大量数值模拟，我们证明了我们的结论对于许多相关的非克利福德电路仍然成立。这些结果阐明了随机编译如何减轻记忆效应并增强电路的鲁棒性。

Abstract

Randomized compiling (RC) is an established tool to tailor arbitrary quantum noise channels into Pauli errors. The effect of both spatial and temporal noise correlations in randomly compiled circuits, however, is not fully understood. Here, we show that for a broad class of correlated Gaussian noise, RC reduces both the strength and temporal range of correlations. For Clifford circuits, we derive a simple analytical expression for the circuit fidelity of randomly compiled circuits. Surprisingly, we show that this fidelity is always increased by the presence of correlations, suggesting that correlations are a resource in randomly compiled circuits. To leading order in system-bath coupling, we also show that RC suppresses the quantum component of bath correlations, implying that one can safely treat weak noise as being classical. Finally, through extensive numerical simulations, we show that our results remain valid for many relevant non-Clifford circuits. These results clarify how RC mitigates memory effects and enhances circuit robustness.

211. Compactifying the Electronic Wavefunction II: Quantum Estimators for Spin-Coupled Generalized Valence Bond Wavefunctions FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Bruna Gabrielly
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于测量的量子框架，用于评估自旋耦合广义价键波函数的重叠和哈密顿矩阵元素，并通过量子电路仿真在H4分子上验证了其准确性和化学一致性。
摘要翻译

本文提出一种基于测量的量子框架，用于评估自旋耦合广义价键波函数中的重叠积分与哈密顿矩阵元。该方法针对非正交价键方法的核心难题：估算不同且通常非正交的组态态函数之间的矩阵元。我们无需在量子硬件上制备完整波函数，而是将所需物理量重新表述为泡利算符串的真空期望值，这些值可通过由局域克利福德旋转和计算基测量构成的浅层、无需辅助量子比特的电路获取。与基于哈达玛测试的矩阵元估算方法相比，该方案通过将问题简化为局域泡利测量，避免了辅助量子比特和受控操作的使用。这使得SCGVB问题的代数构建与在量子寄存器上执行的测量任务相分离，从而产生了一种适用于近期量子架构的低深度策略。我们通过量子电路模拟在正方形和矩形H4体系上验证了该框架，所得重叠积分与哈密顿矩阵能在所考察的几何构型范围内较精确地复现基于经典Löwdin方法的结果，且推导出的Coulson-Chirgwin权重保持化学一致性。这些结果证明了基于测量的量子辅助方法处理非正交SCGVB展开的可行性，并为将量子测量融入价键电子结构工作流程提供了实用路径。

Abstract

We present a measurement-driven quantum framework for evaluating overlap and Hamiltonian matrix elements in spin-coupled generalized valence bond (SCGVB) wavefunctions. The approach targets a central difficulty of nonorthogonal valence-bond methods: estimating matrix elements between distinct, generally nonorthogonal configuration state functions. Rather than preparing the full wavefunction on quantum hardware, we reformulate the required quantities as vacuum expectation values of Pauli-string operators that can be accessed using shallow, ancilla-free circuits composed of local Clifford rotations and computational-basis measurements. In contrast to Hadamard-test-based matrix-element estimation, this construction avoids ancilla qubits and controlled operations by reducing the problem to local Pauli measurements. This separates the algebraic construction of the SCGVB problem from the measurement task executed on the quantum register and yields a low-depth strategy compatible with near-term architectures. We demonstrate the framework on square and rectangular H4 using quantum-circuit emulation, where the resulting overlap and Hamiltonian matrices reproduce classical Lowdin-based references with good accuracy across the geometries considered, and where derived Coulson-Chirgwin weights remain chemically consistent. These results support the feasibility of measurement-based quantum assistance for nonorthogonal SCGVB expansions and provide a practical route for incorporating quantum measurements into valence-bond electronic-structure workflows.

212. Engineering near-unitary one-axis twisting evolution via a driven Tavis-Cummings model FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Jinfeng Liu, Yan Mu, Lili Song, Gang Liu, Mingfeng Wang
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文解决了Tavis-Cummings模型中单轴扭曲演化因斯塔克项导致非幺正性而降低控制精度的问题，提出了一种基于驱动Tavis-Cummings模型的方案来实现近幺正的单轴扭曲演化，并发现时变驱动方案具有更好的抗退相干能力。
摘要翻译

单轴扭曲相互作用是操控原子系综量子态的关键资源，可实现自旋压缩、原子猫态制备及弱相位放大。当前单轴扭曲动力学的实现主要基于光-原子耦合的塔维斯-卡明斯模型，但该方法不可避免地引入额外的斯塔克项，导致光场与原子发生纠缠，从而破坏单轴扭曲演化的幺正性，进而降低基于单轴扭曲的操控精度。本文提出一种基于受驱塔维斯-卡明斯模型的方案，以实现近幺正的单轴扭曲演化。我们证明，原子-腔混合系统在恒定驱动与时变驱动下均可实现近幺正的单轴扭曲演化，但两者具有不同的耦合强度。此外，当考虑原子耗散时，我们发现时变驱动方案展现出更强的抗退相干能力。该方案广泛适用于多种原子平台，包括冷原子、囚禁离子及氮-空位色心体系。

Abstract

One-axis twisting (OAT) interaction is a pivotal resource for manipulating quantum states of atomic ensembles, enabling spin squeezing, atomic-cat-state generation, and weak-phase amplification. Current implementations of OAT dynamics predominantly rely on the Tavis-Cummings model of light-atoms coupling; however, this approach inevitably introduces an additional Stark term that entangles the light with the atoms, which compromises the unitarity of OAT evolution and thereby degrades the OAT-based control precision. Here we propose a scheme based on a driven Tavis-Cummings model to achieve near-unitary OAT evolution. We demonstrate that both constant and time-varying driving of an atoms-cavity hybrid system can realize near-unitary OAT evolution, albeit with distinct coupling strength. Furthermore, when atomic dissipation is taken into account, we find that the time-varying-driving scheme exhibits superior resistance to decoherence. Our approach is broadly applicable to a variety of atomic platforms, including cold atoms, trapped ions, and nitrogen-vacancy centers.

213. All star-incompatible measurements can certify steering-based randomness FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Shintaro Minagawa, Ravi Kunjwal
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文证明了任何星形不相容的量子测量都能生成基于量子导引的随机性，从而建立了星形不相容性与导引随机性之间的等价关系。
摘要翻译

认证由不可信设备生成的量子随机性对攻击者（例如伊芙）具有不可预测性，对于实现设备无关安全性至关重要。在仅有一方可信的双方协议中，通常称为单边设备无关（1SDI）或基于量子导引的协议，其中不可信方（例如爱丽丝）对双方纠缠态中属于她的部分进行测量，以导引可信方（例如鲍勃）的子系统进入不同的量子态集合（整体上称为一个assemblage）。近期研究表明，一个assemblage能够认证随机性，当且仅当它可通过一组星型不相容测量实现，即与伊芙猜测概率相关的关键测量设置至少与爱丽丝其余测量设置中的一个不相容。然而，仍可能存在这样的情形：某些星型不相容测量无法认证基于导引的随机性，正如存在某些不相容测量无法认证双边贝尔非定域性一样。本文证明，任何星型不相容测量集合均能产生基于导引的随机性，从而在这两个概念之间建立了等价关系。我们进一步引入一种基于权重的星型不相容性度量，并给出了认证给定随机性所需的最小下界，从而揭示了星型不相容性与基于导引的随机性这两种量子资源在定性与定量层面的相互作用关系。

Abstract

Certifying that quantum randomness generated by untrusted devices is unpredictable to an attacker (say, Eve) is crucial for device-independent security. Bipartite protocols where only one of the parties is trusted are termed one-sided device-independent (1SDI) or steering-based protocols, where the untrusted party (say, Alice) performs measurements on her part of a bipartite entangled state to steer the subsystem of the trusted party (say, Bob) into different ensembles (collectively, an assemblage) of quantum states. Recent work has shown that an assemblage has certified randomness if and only if it is realizable by a set of measurements that are star-incompatible, i.e., the measurement setting of interest for the guessing probability of Eve is incompatible with at least one of the remaining measurement settings of Alice. However, it remains conceivable that there exist star-incompatible measurements that cannot certify steering-based randomness, just like there exist incompatible measurements that cannot certify bipartite Bell nonlocality. Here we prove that any set of star-incompatible measurements can generate steering-based randomness, thereby establishing an equivalence between the two notions. We further introduce a weight-based measure of star-incompatibility and lower bound the amount required to certify a given randomness, capturing the qualitative and quantitative interplay between the quantum resources of star-incompatibility and steering-based randomness.

214. Propagation of Two-Photon Zernike States in Atmospheric Turbulence FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Hakob Avetisyan, Vahagn Abgaryan
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了双光子Zernike态在大气湍流中的传播特性，发现湍流会引发结构化的方位角和径向串扰，而部分自适应光学校正可有效抑制这种串扰并恢复近理想的空间相关性。
摘要翻译

我们采用扩展的惠更斯-菲涅耳原理，分析了在大气湍流中展开为泽尼克模式的双光子态的传播与探测。对于以单一泽尼克泵浦模式制备的自发参量下转换（SPDC）态，我们通过解析方法将八维连续传播积分简化为精确的离散模态展开。在无湍流条件下，泽尼克模式叠加遵循方位角指数的守恒与严格的径向阶次约束。湍流则松弛了这些限制，引发了以低阶像差模式为主导的结构化方位角与径向串扰。通过从离散湍流求和中显式移除最低阶项，我们证明仅校正至第六径向阶次的部分自适应光学系统，便足以强力抑制此类串扰，并恢复近乎理想的空间关联性。

Abstract

We analyze propagation and detection of two-photon states expanded in Zernike modes through atmospheric turbulence using the extended Huygens-Fresnel formalism. For SPDC states prepared with a single Zernike pump mode, we analytically reduce the 8-dimensional continuous propagation integrals to an exact, discrete modal expansion. In the absence of turbulence, Zernike addition enforces conservation of azimuthal index and a strict radial-order bound. Turbulence relaxes these constraints, driving structured azimuthal and radial crosstalk dominated by low-order aberration modes. By explicitly removing the lowest-order terms from the discrete turbulence sum, we demonstrate that partial adaptive optics correcting only up to the sixth radial order is sufficient to heavily suppress this crosstalk and restore near-ideal spatial correlations.

215. Quantum simulation of Liouville equation in geometrical optics with partial transmission and reflection via Schrödingerization FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Shi Jin, Shuyi Zhang
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了基于Schrödingerization方法的量子模拟算法，用于解决几何光学中具有部分透射和反射的Liouville方程，通过编码界面条件到预计算的矩阵中实现了多项式量子优势。
摘要翻译

本文基于薛定谔化方法，研究了几何光学中具有尖锐界面部分透射与反射的刘维尔方程的量子模拟算法。薛定谔化方法通过在一维更高维度上进行扭曲相位变换，将线性偏微分方程转化为具有幺正演化的薛定谔型方程组，从而使其适用于量子模拟。在本工作中，薛定谔化方法与一种保持哈密顿量的格式相结合，该格式将部分透射与反射纳入数值通量中。一个主要困难在于，经典格式中的界面处理依赖于与阈值相关的“if/else”判断流程，这使得将该方法重构成适合量子模拟的矩阵形式变得极具挑战。为克服此困难，我们将界面条件编码到一个预先制备的部分透射与反射矩阵中，而非在时间演化过程中动态处理。我们详细阐述了所得到的量子算法的构建过程，并通过复杂度分析表明，在精度参数 $ε$ 上，所提出的方法相较于经典算法实现了多项式级的量子优势。

Abstract

This paper investigates quantum simulation algorithms for the Liouville equation in geometrical optics with partial transmission and reflection at sharp interfaces, based on the Schrödingerization method. By means of a warped phase transformation in one higher dimension, the Schrödingerization method converts linear partial differential equations into a system of Schrödinger-type equations with unitary evolution, thereby rendering them suitable for quantum simulation. In this work, the Schrödingerization method is combined with a Hamiltonian-preserving scheme that incorporates partial transmission and reflection into the numerical flux. A main difficulty is that the interface treatment in the classical scheme relies on threshold-dependent "if/else" procedures, making it highly nontrivial to reformulate the method in a matrix form suitable for quantum simulation. To overcome this difficulty, we encode the interface conditions into a partial transmission and reflection matrix prepared a priori, rather than during the time evolution. We present detailed constructions of the resulting quantum algorithms and show through complexity analysis that the proposed methods achieve polynomial quantum advantage in the precision parameter $ε$ over their classical counterparts.

216. Approximate Reduced Lindblad Dynamics via Algebraic and Adiabatic Methods FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Tommaso Grigoletto, Alain Sarlette, Francesco Ticozzi, Lorenza Viola
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个代数框架，用于保证完全正性和迹保持的马尔可夫开放量子动力学的近似模型约简，并展示了其在具有非平稳长时间动力学的耗散多体量子系统中的应用。
摘要翻译

我们提出一种用于马尔可夫开放量子动力学近似模型约化的代数框架，该框架在构造上保证了完全正性和迹保持性。首先，我们证明将林布拉德生成元投影至其中心流形——即由纯虚数本征值对应的本征算符张成的空间——可得到一个渐近精确的约化量子动力学半群，其动力学是幺正的，且瞬态误差以指数形式衰减，衰减速率由生成元的谱隙控制。其次，对于具有可处理中心流形的林布拉德生成元的解析扰动，我们提出一种微扰约化方法，将约化空间固定于未受扰动的中心流形。我们证明所得生成元在任意扰动强度下仍保持为有效的林布拉德型算符，并给出了显式的有限时间误差界，用以量化从未受扰动中心扇区的泄漏。我们进一步阐明了该方法与绝热消除方法的联系：一方面展示了代数约化如何直接关联于一阶绝热消除；另一方面给出了在保持完全正性条件下应用后一方法的充分条件。我们通过展示在呈现非平稳长时动力学的耗散多体量子系统中的适用性，证明了所提技术的实用性。

Abstract

We present an algebraic framework for approximate model reduction of Markovian open quantum dynamics that guarantees complete positivity and trace preservation by construction. First, we show that projecting a Lindblad generator on its center manifold -- the space spanned by eigenoperators with purely imaginary eigenvalue -- yields an asymptotically exact reduced quantum dynamical semigroup whose dynamics is unitary, with exponentially decaying transient error controlled by the generator's spectral gap. Second, for analytic perturbations of a Lindblad generator with a tractable center manifold, we propose a perturbative reduction that keeps the reduced space fixed at the unperturbed center manifold. The resulting generator is shown to remain a valid Lindbladian for arbitrary perturbation strengths, and explicit finite-time error bounds, that quantify leakage from the unperturbed center sector, are provided. We further clarify the connection to adiabatic elimination methods, by both showing how the algebraic reduction can be directly related to a first-order adiabatic-elimination and by providing sufficient conditions under which the latter method can be applied while preserving complete positivity. We showcase the usefulness of our techniques in dissipative many-body quantum systems exhibiting non-stationary long-time dynamics.

217. From vacuum amplitudes to qubits FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Germán Rodrigo
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文探讨了如何将量子计算应用于高能对撞机物理，特别是利用量子机器学习分析对撞机数据、加速计算多圈真空振幅，并初步实现了高维函数积分采样以构建量子事件生成器。
摘要翻译

以欧洲核子研究中心大型强子对撞机为代表的高能对撞机本质上是量子机器。根据理查德·费曼对量子计算的基础构想，对撞机物理学因此成为量子模拟的首要候选领域。潜在应用方向包括：面向对撞机数据分析的量子机器学习、复杂多圈费曼图的高效计算、喷注聚类算法的优化、改进的部分子簇射模拟及相关计算挑战。本文重点探讨两项具体应用：一是多圈真空振幅中因果结构的识别——这是展现图论深层联系的圈-树对偶理论的基本组成部分；二是高维函数积分与采样技术。后者为实现能够在高微扰阶次运行的完整量子事件生成器迈出了关键的第一步。

Abstract

High-energy colliders, exemplified by the CERN's Large Hadron Collider (LHC), constitute genuine quantum machines. In alignment with Richard Feynman's foundational vision for quantum computing, collider physics emerge therefore as a prime candidate for quantum simulations. Prospective applications include Quantum Machine Learning for collider data analysis, accelerated evaluation of complex multiloop Feynman diagrams, efficient jet clustering, enhanced parton shower simulations, and related computational challenges. We discuss two specific applications: the identification of causal structures in multiloop vacuum amplitudes, a fundamental component of the Loop-Tree Duality exhibiting deep connections to graph theory; and high-dimensional function integration and sampling. The latter constitutes an initial step toward realizing a fully fleged quantum event generator capable of operating at high perturbative orders.

218. Hybrid Analog Teleportation-Direct Transmission in Noisy Bosonic Channels FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Uesli Alushi, Simone Felicetti, Roberto Di Candia
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了在噪声玻色子信道中混合隐形传态与直接传输的量子态转移协议，发现当通信信道降低所有具有相同纠缠量的二分态纠缠时量子隐形传态更优，否则混合协议最优，并应用于相干态码本传输，与光学和超导微波信道相关。
摘要翻译

量子隐形传态利用共享的纠缠资源、局域操作以及经过数字纠错的经典信道，在远距离双方之间传输量子态。我们提出了一种用于态传输的混合式隐形传态-直接传输协议，该协议仍利用纠缠，但通过有噪量子信道中的模拟前馈取代了经典通信与数字纠错。我们证明，若通信信道会降低所有与资源具有相同纠缠量的二分态的纠缠度，则量子隐形传态优于该协议；反之，混合协议为最优方案。我们将研究结果应用于均匀分布相干态码本的态传输，重点阐明了本协议最为有效的实验相关场景。我们的发现与光学及超导微波信道直接相关，其中模拟前馈技术已在近期得以实现。

Abstract

Quantum teleportation uses a shared entangled resource, local operations, and a digitally error-corrected classical channel to transfer quantum states between distant parties. We introduce a hybrid teleportation-direct transmission protocol for state transfer that still exploits entanglement, but replaces classical communication and digital error correction with an analog feedforward through a noisy quantum channel. We show that quantum teleportation outperforms this protocol if the communication channel reduces the entanglement of all bipartite states having the same amount of entanglement as the resource; otherwise, the hybrid protocol is optimal. We apply our result to the state transfer of a uniformly distributed coherent-states codebook, highlighting experimentally relevant scenarios where our protocol is most effective. Our findings are directly relevant to both optical and superconducting microwave channels, where analog feedforward techniques have been recently implemented.

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于量子退火的相干态有效自旋模型，能够准确预测实验设置并为未来量子硬件优化提供实用工具。
摘要翻译

相干态因其固有的抗比特翻转噪声保护特性，为近期量子计算提供了一条前景广阔的路径。然而，其大光子数特性对数值模拟提出了挑战。本文引入了一种有效模型，利用自旋-1/2自由度来表征相干态量子退火过程。我们证明，该模型能在实际实验设置中给出精确预测，因此可作为优化未来量子硬件的实用工具。

Abstract

Coherent states offer a promising path for near-term quantum computing due to their inherent protection against bit-flip noise. However, their large photon numbers can be challenging for numerical simulation. This paper introduces an effective model, representing coherent-state quantum annealing using spin-1/2 degrees of freedom. We demonstrate that this model yields accurate predictions for realistic experimental settings and can therefore serve as a practical tool for optimizing future quantum hardware.

220. Lectures on Open Quantum Systems FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Marco Merkli, Ángel Neira
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文介绍了开放量子系统的数学理论，通过具体模型展示了不可逆动力学如何从酉系统-环境演化中产生，并推导了主方程、证明了Kraus表示定理和GKSL定理等核心结果。
摘要翻译

本文是对开放量子系统数学理论的简要介绍，旨在为这一涉及受外部噪声影响系统的广泛研究领域提供入门指引。其核心思路是从具体模型中呈现理论的关键结构。通过解析耗散性Jaynes-Cummings模型，读者将清晰理解不可逆动力学如何从封闭的系统-环境演化中产生。连续模极限、关联函数、谱密度等概念将以自然方式呈现，并推导出以主方程形式表达的开放系统演化方程。这为更普遍地分析完全正定、迹保持映射以及研究量子动力学半群奠定了基础。我们阐释并证明了克劳斯表示定理、扩张定理以及Gorini-Kossakowski-Sudarshan-Lindblad定理。通过完成所有习题（附完整解答），读者将进一步巩固正文中阐述的核心概念。

Abstract

These notes are a short introduction to the mathematical theory of open quantum systems. They are meant to serve as an entry point into a broad research area which has applications across the quantum sciences dealing with systems subjected to external noise. The guiding idea is to let the key structures of the theory emerge from a concrete model. By working through the dissipative Jaynes-Cummings model the reader will dis- cover explicitly how irreversible dynamics arises from a unitary system-reservoir evolution. The notions of the continuous mode limit, correlation functions, spectral density appear in a natural manner and lead to the evolution equation of the open system in form of a master equation. This sets the stage for the more general analysis of completely positive, trace preserving (CPTP) maps and the study of quantum dynamical semigroups. We motivate and prove the Kraus representation theorem, the dilation theorem and the Gorini-Kossakowski-Sudarshan-Lindblad (GKSL) theorem. Working through the exercises (for which full solutions are supplied) will reinforce the ideas introduced in the main text.

Authors: Kazuya Shinjo, Kazuhiro Seki, Seiji Yunoki
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文在可编程超导量子处理器上实现了对称保护的量子同步和量子嵌合体态，通过实验和模拟证明了这些非平衡动力学相在量子多体系统中的存在。
摘要翻译

同步是经典非线性系统中集体行为的标志性特征，但其作为相干量子系统中鲁棒多体现象的实现仍很大程度上未被探索。本文在可编程超导量子处理器上，通过相干弗洛凯动力学演示了对称性保护的量子同步及量子嵌合态。通过在IBM重六边形设备上实现二维海森堡模型的频闪演化，我们观察到初始相位随机化的自旋会自发自组织为跨越整个晶格的相干振荡。在28个量子比特上，即使对于强随机化的初始态，同步依然持续存在，并且受到SU(2)对称性的稳定保护，这一点通过显式对称性破缺得以证实。将系统扩展至156个量子比特后，揭示出一个性质截然不同的区域：对于弱初始随机性，全局同步在整个设备中延伸；而对于强随机性，系统虽无法实现全局同步，但在均匀幺正动力学下，量子比特的子集仍展现出鲁棒的局域相位相干性。这种全局失同步与局域同步区域共存的状态，构成了经典嵌合态的量子类比。态矢量和矩阵乘积态模拟重现了对称性保护的同步与嵌合共存现象，证明这些现象源于内在的弗洛凯多体动力学。我们的研究结果确立了对称性保护的同步与量子嵌合态作为可编程多体量子系统中可通过实验获取的非平衡动力学相。

Abstract

Synchronization is a hallmark of collective behavior in classical nonlinear systems, yet its realization as a robust many-body phenomenon in coherent quantum systems remains largely unexplored. Here we demonstrate symmetry-protected quantum synchronization and a quantum chimera state in coherent Floquet dynamics on programmable superconducting quantum processors. By implementing stroboscopic evolution of a two-dimensional Heisenberg model on IBM heavy-hex devices, we observe that initially phase-randomized spins spontaneously self-organize into coherent lattice-wide oscillations. On 28 qubits, synchronization persists even for strongly randomized initial states and is stabilized by SU(2) symmetry, as confirmed by explicit symmetry breaking. Scaling up to 156 qubits reveals a qualitatively distinct regime. For weak initial randomness, global synchronization extends across the device. For strong randomness, the system fails to synchronize globally, yet subsets of qubits exhibit robust local phase coherence under homogeneous unitary dynamics. This coexistence of globally desynchronized and locally synchronized regions constitutes a quantum analogue of a classical chimera state. Statevector and matrix-product-state simulations reproduce both the symmetry-protected synchronization and the chimera coexistence, demonstrating that these phenomena arise from the intrinsic Floquet many-body dynamics. Our results establish symmetry-protected synchronization and quantum chimera states as experimentally accessible nonequilibrium dynamical phases in programable many-body quantum systems.

222. Quantum Mechanics from Finite Graded Equality FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Julian G. Zilly
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出量子力学可以从“相等性具有有限分辨率”这一单一假设推导出来，通过用分级可区分性核替换二元相等谓词，推导出有限容量、关系完备性和可逆动力学，最终得到标准量子力学作为N→∞的极限。
摘要翻译

我们提出，量子力学源于一个单一假设：相等性具有有限分辨率。将二元谓词 $x = y$ 替换为分级可区分核 $K(x,y) \in [0,1]$，会强制产生三个结构性后果：有限容量（存在 $N$ 个完全可区分的状态）、关系完备性（所有结构可简化为 $K$ 关系，且不存在优先的测量方向）以及可逆动力学。我们将前两者形式化为公理；饱和公理中的结构性莱布尼茨条件强制基元素的置换不变性，而完整的动力学结构（$N$ 阶循环演化、复系数和连续幺正时间演化）则由此唯一确定。从这些公理出发（结合附录 B 推导的规范性条件：复数域 $\mathbb{C}$ 是唯一支持循环动力学和关系各向同性的域；确定性隐变量需要 $Ω(N^2)$ 比特的存储量（对于素数幂 $N$；对所有 $N \geq 3$ 均超过 $\log_2 N$）；玻恩规则 $p_k = |c_k|^2$ 是在可逆动力学下保持统计可区分性的唯一概率赋值；局部层析成像由 $\mathbb{F} = \mathbb{C}$ 与张量积组合导出。标准量子力学是 $N \to \infty$ 的极限；有限 $N$ 提供了一个自然的紫外截断。唯一的自由参数是容量 $N$。

Abstract

We propose that quantum mechanics follows from a single hypothesis: equality has finite resolution. Replacing the binary predicate $x = y$ with a graded distinguishability kernel $K(x,y) \in [0,1]$ forces three structural consequences: finite capacity ($N$ perfectly distinguishable states), relational completeness (all structure reduces to $K$-relations, and no measurement orientation is privileged), and reversible dynamics. We formalize the first two as axioms; a structural Leibniz condition within the saturation axiom forces permutation invariance of basis elements, and the full dynamical structure (cyclic evolution of order $N$, complex coefficients, and continuous unitary time evolution) is then uniquely determined. From these axioms (with regularity conditions derived in Appendix B: complex coefficients $\mathbb{C}$ are the unique field supporting cyclic dynamics and relational isotropy; deterministic hidden variables require $Ω(N^2)$ bits of storage (for prime-power $N$; exceeding $\log_2 N$ for all $N \geq 3$); the Born rule $p_k = |c_k|^2$ is the unique probability assignment preserving statistical distinguishability under reversible dynamics; and local tomography follows from $\mathbb{F} = \mathbb{C}$ with tensor product composition. Standard quantum mechanics is the $N \to \infty$ limit; finite $N$ provides a natural UV cutoff. The single free parameter is capacity $N$.

223. Probing the memory of a superconducting qubit environment FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Nicolas Gosling, Denis Bénâtre, Nicolas Zapata, Paul Kugler, Mitchell Field, Sumeru Hazra, Simon Günzler, Thomas Reisinger, Martin Spiecker, Mathieu Féchant, Ioan M. Pop
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了超导量子比特如何通过量子跳跃轨迹区分长寿命二能级系统与标准马尔可夫环境，并展示了通过扫描量子比特频率可以识别这些二能级系统。
摘要翻译

实现超导量子处理器的容错操作，需要量子比特在基于玻恩-马尔可夫近似的阈值定理所规定的范围内工作。该近似将耗散建模为能量持续衰减到一个无记忆的环境中，但当量子比特与长寿命的双能级系统耦合时，这一近似便不再成立——这些双能级系统在操作过程中会被极化，并保留对过去量子比特状态的记忆。本文证明，非泊松的量子跳跃轨迹携带着区分长寿命双能级系统与标准马尔可夫浴所需的信息。通过将所罗门方程拟合到由热涨落自然产生的测量量子跳跃动力学，我们可以解析量子比特与这两种环境的耦合。扫描量子比特频率会显示出不同的峰值，每个峰值对应一个寿命超过量子比特的双能级系统，这为理解其微观起源提供了途径。

Abstract

Achieving fault tolerance with superconducting quantum processors requires qubits to operate within the regime of threshold theorems based on the Born-Markov approximation. This approximation, which models dissipation as constant energy decay into a memoryless environment, breaks down when qubits couple to long-lived two-level systems (TLSs) that become polarized during operation and retain memory of past qubit states. Here, we show that non-Poissonian quantum jump traces carry the information required to distinguish long-lived TLSs from the standard Markovian bath. By fitting the Solomon equations to measured quantum jumps dynamics arising naturally due to thermal fluctuations, we can disentangle the coupling of the qubit to the two environments. Sweeping the qubit frequency reveals distinct peaks, each associated with a TLS that outlives the qubit, providing a handle to understand their microscopic origin.

224. On Contextuality as a Feature of Logic and Probability Theory FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Ask Ellingsen
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了量子力学中观测结果的语境依赖性（contextuality），并将其形式化为逻辑和概率论的一般数学特征，而非特定量子理论的属性。
摘要翻译

在量子力学中，并非所有可观测的量都能被同时观测。观测数据展现出**语境性**——一种非定域性的广义形式——如果观测结果必然依赖于所测量的可观测量组合。本文对语境性进行了数学上的介绍，强调其作为概率论与逻辑的普遍特征，而非特定量子理论的特性。

Abstract

In quantum mechanics, not everything that can be observed can be observed simultaneously. Observational data exhibits \emph{contextuality} -- a generalisation of nonlocality -- if the result of an observation is necessarily dependent on which combination of observables was measured. This article gives a mathematical introduction to contextuality, emphasising its nature as a general feature of probability theory and logic, rather than of any particular quantum theory.

225. Symbolic Quantum State Representation and its Simulation FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Simon Sekavcnik, Janis Noetzel
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于符号算子框架的量子光子系统模拟方法，能够直接处理正则对易关系和Weyl代数，并展示了其在模拟高斯脉冲Hong-Ou-Mandel干涉中的应用。
摘要翻译

我们提出一种用于模拟量子光子系统的符号算子框架，该框架直接基于正则对易关系与外尔代数进行运算。与现有的福克空间或高斯态模拟器不同，我们的方法在连续体系中处理时空波包与偏振模式，不依赖于离散化或希尔伯特空间截断。器件操作被表示为作用于产生算符与湮灭算符的代数重写规则，从而允许有限光子态在线性光学网络中实现精确演化。作为示例，我们重现了具有可控时域与频谱失配的高斯脉冲的洪-欧-曼德尔干涉现象。

Abstract

We introduce a symbolic operator framework for simulating quantum photonic systems that works directly with the canonical commutation relations and the Weyl algebra. Unlike existing Fock-space or Gaussian simulators, our method treats temporal wave packets and polarization modes in a continuous setting and does not rely on discretization or Hilbert-space truncation. Device operations are expressed as algebraic rewrite rules acting on creation and annihilation operators, allowing exact evolution of finite-photon states through linear optical networks. As an illustration, we reproduce Hong-Ou-Mandel interference for Gaussian pulses with controlled temporal and spectral mismatch.

226. Uniqueness of imaginarity-assisted transformation from computationally universal to strictly universal quantum computation FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Yasuaki Nakayama, Yuki Takeuchi, Seiseki Akibue
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文证明了在自由实操作下，最大虚数态|+i⟩是实现从计算普适性到严格普适性转换的唯一资源状态，且如果资源状态无法实现这种转换，则可实现的量子门仅限于实正交矩阵。
摘要翻译

利用最大虚性态$|+i\rangle$及若干非虚性辅助量子比特，可将基于基本门集$\{H,CCZ\}$的计算普适性转化为严格普适性。从操作资源理论的角度看，阐明这种普适性转化所需的资源将具有重要意义。本文探讨了在自由实操作下实现普适性转化所需资源态的充要条件。我们证明$|+i\rangle$在自由操作等价意义下是唯一的资源态。此外，我们得到了一个更强的结论：若给定资源态无法用于实现普适性转化，则可实现的量子门将受限于实正交矩阵。因此，$|+i\rangle$不仅是虚性资源度量达到最大的唯一态（在自由操作等价意义下），同时也是能使实操作获得至少一个非实数量子门实施能力（无论其虚部大小如何）的唯一态。

Abstract

The computational universality with an elementary gate set $\{H,CCZ\}$ can be transformed to the strict universality by using a maximally imaginary state $|+i\rangle$ and some non-imaginary ancillary qubits. From the viewpoint of operational resource theory, it would be intriguing to elucidate a resource for the universality transformation. In this paper, we explore a necessary and sufficient condition for resource states to realize the universality transformation under free real operations. We show that $|+i\rangle$ is a unique resource state up to the free operations. Moreover, we obtain a stronger conclusion. If a given resource state cannot be used for the universality transformation, then realizable quantum gates are restricted to real orthogonal matrices. Therefore, we can tell that $|+i\rangle$ is unique (up to the free operations) not only as a state whose resource measure of imaginarity is maximal, but also as a state which empowers real operations with the ability to apply at least one non-real quantum gate (regardless of the magnitudes of its imaginary parts).

227. Optimal quantum metrology protocols with erasure qubits FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Michal Arieli, Alex Retzker, Tuvia Gefen
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了在擦除噪声存在下，用于传感单量子比特信号的精度极限和最优协议，发现擦除噪声的可检测性可提高精度极限并简化传感协议，同时量子误差校正能恢复海森堡极限精度。
摘要翻译

我们研究了在擦除噪声存在下感知单量子比特信号的精度极限与最优协议。通过分析不同复杂度计量策略所能达到的精度极限层次，我们确定了每种情况下的最优协议。研究表明，擦除噪声的可检测性能够提升精度极限并简化传感协议。对于能隙估计，我们证明一种简单的乘积态连续擦除检测策略可带来显著改进，即使在大规模量子比特系统中也优于最优纠缠协议。对于其他单量子比特信号，量子纠错通过修正主导的擦除过程展现出显著优势，并能在特定擦除构型中恢复海森堡极限精度。作为分析的副产品，我们发现了针对热噪声量子比特的擦除转换方案，这些方案能够达到相应的最终精度极限。

Abstract

We investigate the precision limits and optimal protocols for sensing single qubit signals in the presence of erasure noise. We study a hierarchy of precision limits achievable with metrological strategies of differing complexity, and identify the optimal protocol for each. The detectability of erasure noise is shown to lead to enhanced precision limits and simplified sensing protocols. For energy gap estimation, we demonstrate that a simple product-state continuous erasure detection strategy yields significant improvements, outperforming optimal entangled protocols even for large numbers of qubits. We show that for other single-qubit signals, quantum error correction provides a substantial advantage by correcting the dominant erasure processes, and can restore Heisenberg-limited precision in certain erasure configurations. As a byproduct of our analysis, we find erasure-conversion schemes for qubits subject to thermal noise that attain the corresponding ultimate precision limits.

228. Quantum Many-Body Mpemba Effect through Resonances FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Shion Yamashika, Ryusuke Hamazaki
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了封闭量子多体混沌系统中量子Mpemba效应的微观起源，通过Ruelle-Pollicott共振框架解释了局部子系统平衡加速现象，并在受踢Ising链模型中验证了理论预测。
摘要翻译

系统从非平衡态出发时，其弛豫至平衡的过程通常被认为初始态偏离平衡越远则越慢，但这种直觉在姆潘巴效应中并不成立。近年来可控量子平台的发展使得对其量子类比——量子姆潘巴效应（QME）的探索成为可能，然而其微观起源在很大程度上仍不明确。本文通过将局域子系统的平衡过程用吕埃勒-波利科特（RP）共振理论重新表述，为理解封闭量子多体混沌系统中的QME提供了一个普适框架。我们证明，抑制初始态与主导RP共振模式的重叠可加速子系统平衡，从而产生QME。我们进一步发现，通过初始态的完全平移对称性破缺，可能产生一种新型的强量子姆潘巴效应。我们利用典型的受踢伊辛链以及受数论启发、具有实验可行性的奇异初始态验证了这些理论预测。这些发现将封闭多体系统中的QME与开放系统的类似现象纳入统一框架，并为在先进量子平台上进行实验观测提供了可行方案。

Abstract

Relaxation towards equilibrium is often assumed to be slower when a system starts farther from equilibrium, but this intuition fails in the Mpemba effect. Recent advances in controllable quantum platforms have enabled the exploration of its quantum analogue, the quantum Mpemba effect (QME), yet its microscopic origin remains largely unclear. Here we provide a general framework for understanding the QME in closed quantum many-body chaotic systems by reformulating the equilibration process of local subsystems in terms of Ruelle-Pollicott (RP) resonances. We show that suppressing the initial-state overlap with the dominant RP resonant mode accelerates subsystem equilibration and thereby yields the QME. We further uncover that a novel type of strong QME can occur via complete translation-symmetry breaking of initial states. We substantiate our predictions using the prototypical kicked Ising chain and exotic yet experimentally relevant initial states inspired by number theory. These findings cast the QME in closed many-body systems into a unified framework with open-system analogues and provide experimentally accessible signatures on state-of-the-art quantum platforms.

229. Experimental Demonstrations of Coherence de Broglie Wavelength for Scalable Superresolution with Near-perfect Fringe Visibility FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: S. Kim, B. S. Ham
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文通过实验演示了相干德布罗意波长（CBW）在相干耦合干涉仪架构中实现可扩展超分辨率的方法，达到了N=3的近完美条纹可见度，且对光子损失具有不变性，为超分辨率传感平台提供了潜在技术基础。
摘要翻译

量子传感与计量学在过去数十年间得到深入研究，旨在突破经典系统的固有散粒噪声极限并逼近海森堡极限。然而，基于N00N态的量子传感实现一直受到严重制约，包括级数N的有限性、固有的干涉条纹可见度不理想以及对光子损耗的敏感性。近年来，相干德布罗意波长被提出作为一种替代方案，可在相干耦合干涉仪架构中实现超分辨率，其特性类似于量子传感中使用的光子德布罗意波长。本文通过实验展示了可扩展至N=3的相干德布罗意波长超分辨率，其干涉条纹可见度近乎完美，且不受光子损耗影响。观测到的相干德布罗意波长有望构建一种超分辨率传感平台，即使该平台仍处于散粒噪声极限范围内。

Abstract

Quantum sensing and metrology have been intensively studied over the last several decades to surpass the fundamental shot-noise limit of classical systems and approach the Heisenberg limit. However, implementation of N00N-state-based quantum sensing has been severely constrained by the limited order N, intrinsically imperfect fringe visibility, and vulnerability to photon loss. Recently, the coherence de Broglie wavelength (CBW) has been proposed as an alternative method for achieving superresolution in a coherently coupled interferometer architecture, whose characteristics resemble those of photonic de Broglie wavelength (PBW) used in quantum sensing. Here, we experimentally demonstrate scalable CBW superresolution up to N=3, with near-perfect fringe visibility that is invariant to photon loss. The observed CBWs have the potential to enable a superresolution sensing platform even if it remains within the shot-noise limit.

230. Demonstration of High-Fidelity Gates in a Strongly Anharmonic with Long-Coherence C-Shunt Flux Qubit FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Silu Zhao, Li Li, Weiping Yuan, Xinhui Ruan, Jinzhe Wang, Bingjie Chen, Yunhao Shi, Guihan Liang, Shi Xiao, Jiacheng Song, Jinming Guo, Xiaohui Song, Kai Xu, Heng Fan, Zhongcheng Xiang, Dongning Zheng
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文在具有强非谐性和长弛豫时间的C-shunt flux量子比特上实现了保真度超过99.9%的高性能单量子比特门，证明了其作为可扩展量子信息处理平台的潜力。
摘要翻译

我们展示了在C型分流磁通量子比特上实现的高保真度单量子比特门操作，该量子比特同时具备大非谐性（$\mathcal{A}/2π=848~\mathrm{MHz}$）与长弛豫时间（$T_1 = 23~\mathrm{μs}$）。大非谐性显著抑制了向更高能级的泄漏，从而实现了快速且精确的微波控制。通过采用DRAG（导数去除通过门控）脉冲和随机基准测试，该量子比特实现了超过99.9%的门保真度，凸显了C型分流磁通量子比特在实现鲁棒高性能量子运算方面的潜力。这些结果确立了其作为可扩展量子信息处理的一个有前景的平台。

Abstract

We demonstrate high-fidelity single-qubit gates on a C-shunt flux qubit that simultaneously combines a large anharmonicity ($\mathcal{A}/2π=848~\mathrm{MHz}$) with long relaxation time ($T_1 = 23~μ\text{s}$). The large anharmonicity significantly suppresses leakage to higher energy levels, enabling fast and precise microwave control. Using DRAG pulses and randomized benchmarking, the qubit achieves gate fidelities exceeding 99.9\%, highlighting the capability of C-shunt flux qubits for robust and high-performance quantum operations. These results establish them as a promising platform for scalable quantum information processing.

231. All-electrostatic valley qubit gates in tilted Dirac-Weyl semimetals FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Can Yesilyurt
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了在倾斜狄拉克材料中利用静电势垒实现全电控谷量子比特门，实现了对波函数谷分量的相干相位控制，为通用单量子比特操作提供了方案。
摘要翻译

倾斜狄拉克材料中的谷自由度为实现全电学量子调控提供了途径，但以往的静电势垒方案仅将谷索引作为经典滤波资源使用。本文证明，在垂直入射条件下，以量子点接触结构运行的平滑静电势垒可实现相干谷相位调控。在单模区间内，两个谷均保持接近单位的透射率，同时倾斜诱导的谷依赖渡越相位在波函数的$|K\rangle$与$|K'\rangle$分量间产生可控的相对相位移动$Δd = δ_K - δ_{K'}$。该静电元件由此实现了可调谐的谷$Z$旋转，其可达相位范围覆盖完整$2π$区间的99.5%，且在宽参数窗口内保持透射平衡度量$B$高于0.99。结合提供$X$旋转的固定谷混合元件，通过$Z$--$X$--$Z$欧拉分解即可实现通用单量子比特操控。对于实际参数，弹道栅极时间约为50\,fs，其中8-$Pmmn$硼烯与WTe$_2$材料体系存在特别有利的操作窗口。这些研究结果确立了倾斜狄拉克半金属可作为实现相干全电学谷操控的平台。

Abstract

Valley degrees of freedom in tilted Dirac materials offer a route toward fully electrical quantum control, but previous electrostatic barrier schemes have used the valley index only as a classical filtering resource. Here, we show that a smooth electrostatic barrier operated in a quantum point contact geometry at normal incidence instead realizes coherent valley phase control. In the single-mode regime, both valleys retain near-unit transmission while the tilt-induced valley-dependent traversal phase generates a controllable relative phase shift $Δd = δ_K - δ_{K'}$ between the $|K\rangle$ and $|K'\rangle$ components of the wavefunction. The resulting electrostatic element implements a tunable valley $Z$ rotation whose accessible phase range covers 99.5\% of the full $2π$ interval while maintaining a transmission-balance metric $B$ above 0.99 over a broad parameter window. Combined with a fixed valley-mixing element that supplies an $X$ rotation, this enables universal single-qubit control through a $Z$--$X$--$Z$ Euler decomposition. For realistic parameters, the ballistic gate time is $\sim$50\,fs, with particularly favourable operating windows in 8-$Pmmn$ borophene and WTe$_2$. These results establish tilted Dirac semimetals as a platform for coherent, all-electrical valley manipulation.

232. Enhancement of signal-to-noise ratio at a high-order exceptional point of coherent perfect absorption FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Zi-Qi Wang, Yi-Ming Sun, Yao-Dong Hu, Yi-Pu Wang, Rui-Chang Shen, Wei-Jiang Wu, J. Q. You
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文解决了高阶异常点传感器中噪声发散的问题，通过在被动腔磁子系统中实现相干完美吸收的三阶异常点，将磁传感的信噪比提高了十二倍。
摘要翻译

非厄米系统中的奇异点（EPs）对微弱扰动具有极强的响应能力，但相应本征矢的非正交性会导致噪声发散，限制了奇异点的实际应用。本文报道了一种基于无源腔磁子系统中相干完美吸收三阶奇异点（CPA EP3）的磁场传感技术，实现了信噪比（SNR）十二倍的提升。该非厄米磁子平台包含两个与腔模相干耦合的相同钇铁石榴石（YIG）球，通过调控三模损耗形成伪厄米吸收哈密顿量，从而实现了CPA EP3。通过将吸收奇异点与共振奇异点独立调控，该系统规避了本征基塌陷引起的噪声发散。值得注意的是，我们利用CPA附近最小输出强度对扰动的敏感性，相较于非CPA系统实现了信噪比七十倍的提升和响应度四百倍的增强。基于上百次重复测量的综合噪声分析证实了CPA EP3附近频率噪声的抑制。这表明我们的方案不仅避免了困扰传统高阶奇异点传感器的噪声发散问题，还为在无源非厄米系统中协同利用CPA与EP以增强信噪比提供了一种通用策略。

Abstract

Exceptional points (EPs) in non-Hermitian systems offer a remarkably strong response to weak perturbations, but the nonorthogonal nature of the corresponding eigenvectors causes noise to diverge, hindering EPs practical application. Here, we report a twelve-fold enhancement of signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) in magnetic field sensing enabled by a third-order EP of coherent perfect absorption (CPA EP3) in a passive cavity magnonic system. This non-Hermitian magnonic platform comprises two identical yttrium iron garnet (YIG) spheres coherently coupled to a cavity mode, in which the CPA EP3 is realized by engineering the three-mode loss to form a pseudo-Hermitian absorption Hamiltonian. By independently tailoring the absorption EP apart from the resonance EP, the system circumvents the noise divergence caused by eigenbasis collapse. Notably, we harness the sensitivity of the minimum output intensity near CPA to perturbations, yielding a seventyfold SNR improvement and a 400-fold increase in responsivity compared with non-CPA system. A comprehensive noise analysis over one hundred repeated measurements confirms the suppression of frequency noise near the CPA EP3. This demonstrates that our scheme not only avoids the noise divergence plaguing conventional higher-order EP sensors but also provides a general strategy to exploit both CPA and EP for SNR enhancement in passive non-Hermitian systems.

233. Criticality-enhanced global frequency sensing with a monitored Kerr parametric oscillator via extended Kalman filter FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Cheng Zhang, Mauro Cirio, Xin-Qi Li, Pengfei Liang
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究如何通过监测Kerr参量振荡器并利用扩展卡尔曼滤波和临界增强技术，在有限先验信息下实现鲁棒的全局频率估计。
摘要翻译

我们分析了一种全局传感场景，其中在假设先验信息有限的条件下，对一个受监测的克尔参量振荡器的频率进行估计。该频率通过零差探测连续监测振荡器的正交分量，并利用扩展卡尔曼滤波器对所得光电流进行实时处理来估计。由于传感器的非线性特性，单个扩展卡尔曼滤波器轨迹在长时间极限下并不总是收敛到真实未知频率。然而，我们证明，在相同极限下，频率估计值的统计分布确实会在真实值附近呈现出一个尖锐的峰值。利用这一关键统计特性，我们开发了一种全局传感协议，该协议通过自适应控制传感器参数来利用临界增强效应。我们提供的数值证据表明，这种临界增强的频率估计在低探测效率下仍保持稳健性。

Abstract

We analyze a global sensing scenario in which the frequency of a monitored Kerr parametric oscillator is estimated assuming limited prior information. The frequency is estimated in real-time by continuously monitoring the oscillator quadrature through homodyne detection and processing the resulting photocurrent with an extended Kalman filter (EKF). Due to the sensor nonlinearity, individual EKF trajectories do not always converge to the true unknown frequency in the long-time limit. However, we show that the statistical distribution of the frequency estimates does exhibit a sharp peak around the true value in the same limit. Leveraging this key statistical property, we develop a global sensing protocol assisted by adaptive control of the sensor parameters to harness critical enhancement. We present numerical evidence that this criticality-enhanced frequency estimation remains robust under low detection efficiency.

234. Surpassing Quantum Noise Limits with Nonlinear Amplification FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Ya-Long Ren, Rong-Teng Cao, Sheng-Li Ma, Ren Zhang, Fu-Li Li, Franco Nori, Peng-Bo Li
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种非线性量子放大策略，通过耦合双模玻色系统中的增益稳定亮本征模与Kerr非线性相互作用，使信号增益超过噪声增益，从而实现了信噪比超越传统线性放大器量子极限的提升。
摘要翻译

线性量子放大器是量子技术中不可或缺的工具，但其性能从根本上受到量子噪声的限制，除非辅以后选择或非经典资源，否则无法实现任何信噪比（SNR）的增强。为突破这一限制，我们提出了一种非线性量子放大策略，该策略利用耦合双模玻色子系统中增益稳定的亮本征模与克尔非线性之间的相互作用。我们证明，这种相互作用使得信号增益在选定正交分量上超越噪声增益，从而实现信噪比的净提升，突破了传统线性放大器的量子极限。因此，我们的工作建立了一种能够增强信噪比的新型非线性放大范式，在量子信息处理、量子通信和量子计量学等领域具有广阔的应用前景。

Abstract

Linear quantum amplifiers are indispensable tools for quantum technologies, yet their performance is fundamentally limited by quantum noise, precluding any signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) enhancement unless supplemented by post-selection or non-classical resources. To surpass this limitation, we propose a nonlinear quantum amplification strategy that exploits the interplay between a gain-stabilized bright eigenmode of a coupled two-mode bosonic system and Kerr nonlinearity. We demonstrate that this interplay enables the signal gain to surpass the noise gain in a selected quadrature, leading to a net increase in the SNR beyond the quantum limits of conventional linear amplifiers. Our work thus establishes a novel nonlinear amplification paradigm capable of enhancing the SNR, with promising applications across quantum information processing, quantum communications, and quantum metrology.

235. Quantum computing for transport research: an introduction, systematic review, and perspective FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Lachlan Oberg, Paul Corry, Moji Ghadimi, Ashish Bhaskar
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 这篇论文系统综述了量子计算在交通工程领域的应用，识别了适合量子加速的交通问题，并提出了未来应优先研究能带来实际效益的问题方向。
摘要翻译

交通工程领域具有从量子计算中获益的巨大潜力。智能交通系统、自动驾驶汽车和物联网的兴起，对高效信息处理和计算优化产生了前所未有的需求。为此，交通工程师和科学家们不断探索量子计算机日益提升的计算能力，以期满足这一需求。基于这一日益增长的研究兴趣，本文设定了四个目标：(1) 介绍与交通领域相关的量子计算基本原理，(2) 识别适合进行量子加速的交通相关问题，(3) 构建解决这些问题的流程框架，(4) 对现有文献进行系统性综述。关于文献综述，我们依据PRISMA 2020指南，对Scopus数据库进行了系统性检索（并辅以其他引文来源），最终确定了103项纳入研究。尽管已有多种应用场景被提出，但我们认为，未来的研究应优先关注那些量子计算能带来明确实际效益的问题。为此，我们提出了若干有前景的研究方向，以引导这一新兴子领域的后续工作。

Abstract

Transport engineering has significant potential to benefit from quantum computing. The rise of intelligent transport systems, autonomous vehicles, and the Internet of Things has created an unprecedented demand for efficient information processing and computational optimisation. Accordingly, transport engineers and scientists have explored the ever-improving capabilities of quantum computers in an effort to meet this demand. Motivated by this growing interest, this paper sets out four aims: (1) to introduce the fundamental aspects of quantum computing relevant to the transport domain, (2) to identify transport-related problems which are suitable for quantum acceleration, (3) to develop a pipeline for solving these problems, and (4) to provide a systematic review of the existing literature. For the latter, a systematic search of the Scopus database (and supplemented by additional citation sources) identified 103 studies for inclusion following PRISMA 2020 guidelines. While a diverse set of use cases have been proposed, we conclude that future research should prioritise problems where quantum computation offers a clear practical benefit. To this end, we suggest promising directions to guide further work in this burgeoning subfield.

236. Subtime: Reversible Information Exchange and the Emergence of Classical Time FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Paul L. Borrill
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文通过形式化可逆信息交换（subtime）概念，基于光子钟模型和扩展的OCB框架，提出了可逆因果原理，解释了经典时间箭头如何通过退相干从量子可逆性中涌现。
摘要翻译

我们形式化“亚时间”概念——即纠缠系统内部一种可逆的信息交换模式——并展示经典时间如何通过退相干以渐近极限的形式涌现。基于光子钟模型（在该模型中，一个被约束在两块理想反射镜之间的单光子创造了一种交替因果机制），我们利用奥列什科夫-科斯塔-布鲁克纳框架，并引入显式的时间反演对偶条件进行扩展，发展出一套过程理论的形式化体系。我们引入“完美信息反馈”作为这种可逆性的信息理论实现，证明互信息在任何封闭因果循环中守恒，且熵量化了未被反射的因果性程度。我们提出“可逆因果原理”：每个因果关系都拥有一个共轭对偶，而熵、能量耗散及经典时间箭头的出现，仅当这些交替成分发生退相干或未能完美反射时发生。该框架将惠勒-费曼吸收体理论、贝内特的可逆计算、香农的通信理论以及过程矩阵形式体系统一于单一对称原理之下，并在可逆数字链路与量子开关实验中识别出可通过实验观测的特征。在此图景中，时间箭头记录了宇宙不完美的因果回响。

Abstract

We formalize the concept of subtime -- a reversible mode of information interchange within entangled systems -- and show how classical time emerges as an asymptotic limit through decoherence. Building on the photon clock model, in which a single photon confined between two ideal mirrors creates an alternating causality regime, we develop a process-theoretic formalization using the Oreshkov--Costa--Brukner framework extended with an explicit time-reversal duality condition. We introduce Perfect Information Feedback (PIF) as the information-theoretic realization of this reversibility, demonstrating that mutual information is conserved in any closed causal loop and that entropy quantifies the degree of unreflected causality. We define the Reversible Causal Principle (RCP): every causal relation possesses a conjugate dual, and entropy, energy dissipation, and the classical arrow of time appear only when these alternating components decohere or fail to reflect perfectly. The framework unifies Wheeler--Feynman absorber theory, Bennett's reversible computation, Shannon's communication theory, and the process matrix formalism under a single symmetry principle, and identifies experimentally accessible signatures in reversible digital links and quantum switch experiments. The arrow of time, in this picture, records the universe's imperfect causal echo.

237. Quantum Error Correction by Purification FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Jonathan Raghoonanan, Tim Byrnes
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于状态纯化的通用量子纠错方法（PQEC），通过SWAP测试在多个噪声副本上操作，能有效提升保真度并降低逻辑错误率，特别是在退极化信道下表现优异。
摘要翻译

我们提出一种基于SWAP测试态纯化的通用量子纠错原语，称为纯化量子纠错（PQEC）。该方法在$N$个噪声副本上运行，仅需$O(M\log_2 N)$个数据量子比特即可处理$M$量子比特输入。与标准量子纠错类似，纯化步骤可嵌入量子算法中以抑制逻辑错误率。该方法无需后选择且不依赖量子态的先验知识。我们分析了其在多种错误信道下的性能，发现PQEC在提升保真度和降低逻辑错误率方面效果显著，尤其针对退极化信道。对于局域退极化信道，任意寄存器尺寸下的错误阈值可达$75\%$。对于局域退相信道，错误阈值降至$50\%$，但可通过旋转变换操作予以提升。

Abstract

We present a general-purpose quantum error correction primitive based on state purification via the SWAP test, which we refer to as purification quantum error correction (PQEC). This method operates on $N$ noisy copies, requires minimally $O(M\log_2 N)$ data qubits to process the $M$-qubit inputs. In a similar way to standard QEC, the purification steps may be interleaved within a quantum algorithm to suppress the logical error rate. No postselection is performed and no knowledge of the state is required. We analyze its performance under a variety of error channels and find that PQEC is highly effective at boosting fidelity and reducing logical error rates, particularly for the depolarizing channel. Error thresholds for the local depolarizing channel are found to be $ 75 \%$ for any register size. For local dephasing, the error threshold is reduced to $ 50 \% $ but may be boosted using twirling.

238. Quantum mechanical framework for quantization-based optimization: from Gradient flow to Schroedinger equation FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Jinwuk Seok, Changsik Cho
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个量子力学框架来分析基于量化的优化算法，通过将采样过程建模为梯度流系统并转化为薛定谔方程，证明了量子隧穿效应能够逃离局部极小值并保证全局最优解，数值实验表明该方法在组合优化和非凸连续函数优化中优于传统算法。
摘要翻译

本研究提出了一种用于分析基于量化的优化算法的量子力学框架。该框架将基于量化的搜索采样过程建模为一个梯度流耗散系统，并由此导出一个 Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) 方程表示。通过对目标函数进行适当变换，该表述可推导出薛定谔方程，从而揭示量子隧穿效应能够使算法逃离局部极小值，并保证获得全局最优解。通过建立与福克-普朗克方程的联系，该框架为全局收敛性提供了热力学解释。这种热力学与量子动力学方法论之间的分析，统一了组合优化与连续优化，并可自然延伸至图像分类等机器学习任务。数值实验表明，无论是在组合问题还是非凸连续函数优化中，基于量化的优化算法均持续优于传统算法。

Abstract

This work presents a quantum mechanical framework for analyzing quantization-based optimization algorithms. The sampling process of the quantization-based search is modeled as a gradient-flow dissipative system, leading to a Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) representation. Through a suitable transformation of the objective function, this formulation yields the Schroedinger equation, which reveals that quantum tunneling enables escape from local minima and guarantees access to the global optimum. By establishing the connection to the Fokker-Planck equation, the framework provides a thermodynamic interpretation of global convergence. Such an analysis between the thermodynamic and the quantum dynamic methodology unifies combinatorial and continuous optimization, and extends naturally to machine learning tasks such as image classification. Numerical experiments demonstrate that quantization-based optimization consistently outperforms conventional algorithms across both combinatorial problems and nonconvex continuous functions.

239. Error-Mitigated Hamiltonian Simulation: Complexity Analysis and Optimization for Near-Term and Early-Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computers FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Keisuke Murota, Synge Todo, Suguru Endo
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了在含噪声量子设备中哈密顿量模拟的误差缓解问题，通过复杂度分析和优化，提出了深度选择规则并量化了噪声表征成本。
摘要翻译

模拟哈密顿量下的实时动力学是量子信息科学的核心目标。尽管已提出众多哈密顿量模拟量子算法，但量子设备中不可忽略的噪声水平却很少被纳入性能分析。在本工作中，我们结合量子误差缓解技术，分析了基于Trotter分解和随机化线性组合单元（LCU）的哈密顿量模拟算法在噪声影响下的表现。我们使用均方误差对误差缓解型哈密顿量模拟算法进行了端到端的综合复杂度分析。由于量子误差缓解会随量子算法层数增加而产生指数级成本，因此在采样成本与模拟精度偏差（或算法采样开销）之间存在权衡关系。通过优化这一权衡，我们推导出解析的深度选择规则，并以目标精度和噪声参数为函数，刻画了最优的端到端标度关系。我们进一步量化了通过门集层析成像以及近期提出的时空噪声逆方法进行误差缓解所需的噪声表征成本，结果表明后者能显著降低表征开销。

Abstract

Simulating real-time dynamics under a Hamiltonian is a central goal of quantum information science. While numerous Hamiltonian-simulation quantum algorithms have been proposed, the effects of physical noise have rarely been incorporated into performance analysis, despite the non-negligible noise levels in quantum devices. In this work, we analyze noisy Hamiltonian simulation with quantum error mitigation for Trotterized and randomized LCU-based Hamiltonian simulation algorithms. We give an end-to-end comprehensive complexity analysis of error-mitigated Hamiltonian simulation algorithms using the mean-squared error. Because quantum error mitigation incurs an exponential cost with the number of layers in quantum algorithms, there is a trade-off between the sampling cost and the bias in simulation accuracy or the algorithmic sampling overhead. Optimizing this trade-off, we derive an analytic depth-selection rule and characterize the optimal end-to-end scaling as a function of target accuracy and noise parameters. We further quantify the noise-characterization cost required for error mitigation via gate set tomography and the recently proposed space-time noise inversion method, showing that the latter can significantly reduce the characterization overhead.

240. Back-Action-Evading Measurements and Quantum Non-Demolition Variables via Linear Systems Engineering FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Zhiyuan Dong, Weichao Liang, Guofeng Zhang
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个在量子线性系统中实现后作用规避测量和量子非破坏变量的理论框架，通过特定哈密顿量条件增强了量子计量和传感的精度。
摘要翻译

我们建立了一个在线性量子系统中实现无后作用（BAE）测量与量子非破坏（QND）变量的理论框架。其关键条件——具有实或虚耦合算符的纯虚哈密顿量——使得对共轭观测量进行BAE测量成为可能。对称耦合进一步可产生QND变量。对于不满足该条件的系统，相干反馈控制能够构造出BAE测量。至关重要的是，QND相互作用条件同时确保了BAE测量的实现，并将耦合算符提升为QND观测量。本研究为提升量子计量与传感的精度提供了一套统一的结构性理论。

Abstract

We establish a framework for realizing back-action-evading (BAE) measurements and quantum non-demolition (QND) variables in linear quantum systems. The key condition, a purely imaginary Hamiltonian with a real or imaginary coupling operator, enables BAE measurements of conjugate observables. Symmetric coupling further yields QND variables. For non-compliant systems, coherent feedback can engineer BAE measurements. Crucially, the QND interaction condition simultaneously ensures BAE measurements and promotes the coupling operator to a QND observable. This work provides a unified structural theory for enhancing precision in quantum metrology and sensing.

241. Reliability Dynamics in a Two-Site Dissipative Quantum Spin Chain FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Bowen Sun, D. L. Zhou
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了基于两站点量子自旋链的能量存储设备在耗散环境下的可靠性动力学，通过Lindblad主方程描述环境影响，推导了可靠性和风险率的闭式表达式，并建立了基于首次通过时间统计的实验可访问协议。
摘要翻译

作为器件应用的关键指标，可靠性指器件在特定环境影响下持续存活（随时间正常运作）的能力。本文提出一种基于量子自旋链的量子储能器件模型，其环境影响由林德布拉德主方程描述。当自旋系统保持在具有非零激发的状态时，器件存活；反之则失效。由于林德布拉德动力学强制能量单向衰减且失效状态严格不可逆，我们可直接运用经典可靠性理论研究该量子器件的可靠性。聚焦于最小非平凡情形——二位置自旋-1/2链——我们推导出可靠度与失效率的闭合表达式。动力学行为表现出由相干交换与耗散非均匀性竞争调控的过阻尼-欠阻尼交叉现象，精确解析公式与数值模拟高度吻合。更重要的是，我们建立了一套基于首达时统计、可通过实验实施的可靠性评估方案。

Abstract

As a key index for applications of a device, the device's reliability is its ability to survive (function normally over time) under the influence of some environment. In this paper we present a quantum energy-storing device model with a quantum spin chain, whose environment influence is described by the Lindblad master equation. Here the device survives if the spin system stays in the state with nonzero excitations; otherwise, it fails. Because the Lindblad dynamics enforces one-way energy decay and strict irreversibility of the failure state, we can investigate the reliability of the quantum device directly using classical reliability theory. Focusing on the minimal nontrivial case -- a two-site spin-1/2 chain -- we derive closed-form expressions for the reliability and the hazard rate. The dynamics exhibit an overdamped-underdamped crossover controlled by the competition between coherent exchange and dissipation inhomogeneity. The exact analytical formulas are in excellent agreement with numerical simulations. More importantly, we establish an experimentally accessible protocol for assessing reliability based on first-passage time statistics.

242. Quantum photonic frequency processor on thin-film lithium niobate FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Ran Yang, Wei Zhou, Dong-Jie Guo, Hong-Ming Ke, Linrunde Tao, Ying Wei, Jia-Chen Duan, Yu Cui, Kunpeng Jia, Zhenda Xie, Zhongjin Lin, Xinlun Cai, Yan-Xiao Gong, Shi-Ning Zhu
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文通过铌酸锂薄膜电光平台实现了集成量子光子频率处理器，能够对光子频率进行相干可编程控制，并展示了频率编码量子逻辑门和纠缠态表征的应用。
摘要翻译

光子量子信息处理的快速发展要求对光学频率实现精确且可编程的控制，这一能力不仅对实现光子不可区分性至关重要，也为利用近乎无限的频率维度提供了可能。然而，频率编码光子态的高效、可扩展处理仍然面临挑战，这主要源于大多数光子材料中有限的光学非线性相互作用。本文通过利用高性能薄膜铌酸锂电光平台，展示了一种集成量子光子频率处理器，能够以高精度实现对光子频率的相干且可编程的控制。我们为频率编码量子信息处理建立了一个可扩展的架构。利用一个完全集成的光子芯片，我们实现了一套通用的频率编码量子逻辑门，包括任意单量子比特旋转门和双量子比特受控相位门。此外，我们还展示了其在频率比特纠缠态的高保真度表征中的应用。我们的工作揭示了在集成量子光子系统中利用频率自由度的前所未有的潜力。

Abstract

The rapid development of photonic quantum information processing necessitates precise and programmable control over optical frequency, a capability critical not only for achieving photon indistinguishability but also for exploiting a virtually unbounded frequency dimension. However, efficient and scalable processing of frequency-encoded photon states remains challenging, primarily due to the limited nonlinear optical interaction in most photonic materials. Here, by harnessing the high-performance thin-film lithium niobate electro-optic (EO) platform, we demonstrate an integrated quantum photonic frequency processor that enables coherent and programmable control of photon frequency with high precision. We establish a scalable architecture for frequency-encoded quantum information processing. Using a fully integrated photonic chip, we realize a universal set of frequency-encoded quantum logic gates, including arbitrary single-qubit rotation gates and the two-qubit controlled-phase gate. Furthermore, we demonstrate its application in high fidelity characterization of frequency-bin entangled states. Our work reveals the unprecedented potential of utilizing the frequency degree of freedom in integrated quantum photonic systems.

243. Impact of Oxygen Vacancies in Josephson Junction on Decoherence of Superconducting Qubits FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Hanqin Bai, Shi-Yao Hou, Mu Lan
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该研究通过第一性原理计算和分子动力学模拟，揭示了非晶Al2O3中氧空位缺陷的结构特征和电子影响，发现其浓度和配位环境会增强电导率并导致约瑟夫森结的临界电流噪声，从而缩短量子比特的相干时间，为抗辐射超导量子器件设计提供了见解。
摘要翻译

超导量子电路是可扩展量子计算的有前景平台，其量子比特相干性关键取决于约瑟夫森结氧化物隧穿势垒中的微观缺陷。非晶态Al$_2$O$_3$被广泛用作势垒材料，但在辐照条件下极易产生氧空位（V$_O$）缺陷，这些缺陷会引入噪声源并加速量子比特退相干。我们结合第一性原理计算和从头算分子动力学方法，系统研究了非晶态Al$_2$O$_3$中V$_O$缺陷的结构特征及其电子效应。结果表明，V$_O$的配位环境和浓度均强烈影响电导率。特别是非晶结构特有的二配位与三配位V$_O$，相较于传统四配位空位更能显著提升电导率。增加V$_O$浓度会放大电导率涨落，我们将此现象与约瑟夫森结中的临界电流噪声相关联。通过噪声模型估算，更高的V$_O$密度会导致更短的量子比特相干时间。这些发现为超导量子器件的抗辐照设计提供了理论依据。

Abstract

Superconducting quantum circuits are promising platforms for scalable quantum computing, where qubit coherence is critically determined by microscopic defects in the oxide tunneling barrier of Josephson junctions. Amorphous Al$_2$O$_3$ is widely used as a barrier material, but under irradiation, oxygen vacancy (V$_O$) defects are readily generated, introducing noise sources that accelerate qubit decoherence. We systematically investigate the structural characteristics and electronic impact of V$_O$ defects in amorphous Al$_2$O$_3$ using first-principles calculations and \textit{ab initio} molecular dynamics. Our results show that both the coordination environment and concentration of V$_O$s strongly influence electrical conductivity. In particular, two- and three-coordinated V$_O$s, unique to the amorphous structure, enhance conductivity more than conventional four-coordinated vacancies. Increasing V$_O$ concentration amplifies conductivity fluctuations, which we link to critical current noise in Josephson junctions. Using a noise model, we estimate that higher V$_O$ densities lead to shorter qubit coherence times. These findings provide insights for radiation-hard design of superconducting quantum devices.

244. Diving into booklet wormholes FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Libo Jiang, Yan Liu
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文研究了作为GHZ态全息对偶的booklet虫洞几何，证明了其对称性要求特殊的Killing矢量场和前所未有的量子非定域连接条件，并探讨了通过边界变形使虫洞可穿越的方法。
摘要翻译

arXiv:2508.17898 提出了册子虫洞作为 GHZ 态的全息对偶。本文扩展了对这一几何结构的研究，特别关注物质场的连接条件。我们证明，GHZ 态的对称性要求体时空必须容许标准流形无法实现的特殊基灵矢量场。此外，这些体对称性要求在多路交汇界面处存在前所未有的量子非定域连接条件：从不同视界进入的观察者将在虫洞内部感知到不同的状态，而连接条件则表现为对不同观察者集合的可观测量施加的约束。最后，我们讨论了如何通过边界形变使册子虫洞变得可穿越。从一个页面注入的局域波包通常会在其余每个页面上演化为非定域的混合态，其信息编码在不同页面之间的纠缠之中。

Abstract

ArXiv:2508.17898 proposed the booklet wormhole as the holographic dual of the GHZ state. This paper extends the investigation into this geometry, particularly focusing on the junction conditions for matter fields. We show that the symmetry of the GHZ state requires the bulk to admit special Killing vector fields that standard manifolds cannot realize. Moreover, these bulk symmetries require unprecedented quantum non-local junction conditions at the multi-way interface: Observers entering from different horizons will perceive different states inside the wormhole, where the junction conditions appear as constraints on the observables of different sets of observers. We finally discuss how to render booklet wormholes traversable via boundary deformations. A localized wave packet injected from one page generally evolves into a non-local mixed state on each remaining page, with the information encoded in the entanglement between different pages.

245. Unclonable Encryption in the Haar Random Oracle Model FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: James Bartusek, Eli Goldin
Published: 2026-03-12
TL;DR: 该论文在Haar随机预言机模型中构建了可重复使用的不可克隆加密方案，证明了其在计算假设下的存在性。
摘要翻译

我们在Haar随机预言机模型中构建了不可克隆加密（UE）方案，其中所有参与方均可查询访问Haar随机酉矩阵$U$及其伴随矩阵$U^\dagger$、共轭矩阵$U^*$和转置矩阵$U^T$。该方案满足不可克隆不可区分性的标准安全定义，支持密钥复用，并能加密任意长度的消息。这意味着我们首次证明了（可复用的）UE——其存在依赖于计算假设——可能存在于“微密码学”（micocrypt）世界中，即使单向函数在该世界中可能不存在。 作为核心技术贡献之一，我们在近期提出的路径记录框架基础上，证明了一个自然的“酉重编程引理”，该引理可能具有独立的研究价值。

Abstract

We construct unclonable encryption (UE) in the Haar random oracle model, where all parties have query access to $U,U^\dagger,U^*,U^T$ for a Haar random unitary $U$. Our scheme satisfies the standard notion of unclonable indistinguishability security, supports reuse of the secret key, and can encrypt arbitrary-length messages. That is, we give the first evidence that (reusable) UE, which requires computational assumptions, exists in "micocrypt", a world where one-way functions may not exist. As one of our central technical contributions, we build on the recently introduced path recording framework to prove a natural ``unitary reprogramming lemma'', which may be of independent interest.

246. Detecting Intrinsic and Instrumental Self-Preservation in Autonomous Agents: The Unified Continuation-Interest Protocol FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Christopher Altman
Published: 2026-03-11
TL;DR: 该论文提出了统一延续兴趣协议（UCIP），使用量子玻尔兹曼机分析自主代理轨迹的潜在状态结构，能够以100%准确度区分将延续操作作为终端目标的代理与仅将其作为工具性目标的代理。
摘要翻译

自主智能体，尤其是具备记忆、持久上下文和多步规划能力的委托系统，引发了一种在无状态模型中不存在的测量难题：以持续运作为终极目标的智能体与仅将运作为工具性手段的智能体，可能产生观测上相似的行为轨迹。外部行为监测无法可靠区分二者。本文提出统一持续兴趣协议（Unified Continuation-Interest Protocol, UCIP），这是一个多准则检测框架，将上述区分从行为层面转移至智能体轨迹的潜在结构层面。UCIP采用量子玻尔兹曼机（Quantum Boltzmann Machine, QBM）对轨迹进行编码——这是一种基于量子统计力学密度矩阵形式体系的经典算法，并通过隐单元二分诱导的约化密度矩阵测量其冯·诺依曼熵。 我们检验具有终极持续目标（A型）的智能体是否比仅工具性持续（B型）的智能体产生具有更高纠缠熵的潜在状态。更高的纠缠熵反映了更强的跨分区统计耦合。 在已知真实目标的网格世界智能体上，UCIP在冻结第一阶段门控下的保留非对抗评估中实现了100%检测准确率与1.0的AUC-ROC。A型与B型智能体间的纠缠熵差距为Δ=0.381（p<0.001，置换检验）。在11点插值扫描中皮尔逊相关系数r=0.934表明，在此合成族内，UCIP能追踪持续权重梯度变化而非仅识别二元标签。在所有测试模型中，仅QBM获得正向Δ值。所有计算均为经典计算；“量子”仅指数学形式体系。UCIP不检测意识或主观体验；它检测的是潜在表征中与已知目标相关的统计结构。

Abstract

Autonomous agents, especially delegated systems with memory, persistent context, and multi-step planning, pose a measurement problem not present in stateless models: an agent that preserves continued operation as a terminal objective and one that does so merely instrumentally can produce observationally similar trajectories. External behavioral monitoring cannot reliably distinguish between them. We introduce the Unified Continuation-Interest Protocol (UCIP), a multi-criterion detection framework that moves this distinction from behavior to the latent structure of agent trajectories. UCIP encodes trajectories with a Quantum Boltzmann Machine (QBM), a classical algorithm based on the density-matrix formalism of quantum statistical mechanics, and measures the von Neumann entropy of the reduced density matrix induced by a bipartition of hidden units. We test whether agents with terminal continuation objectives (Type A) produce latent states with higher entanglement entropy than agents whose continuation is merely instrumental (Type B). Higher entanglement reflects stronger cross-partition statistical coupling. On gridworld agents with known ground-truth objectives, UCIP achieves 100% detection accuracy and 1.0 AUC-ROC on held-out non-adversarial evaluation under the frozen Phase I gate. The entanglement gap between Type A and Type B agents is Delta = 0.381 (p < 0.001, permutation test). Pearson r = 0.934 across an 11-point interpolation sweep indicates that, within this synthetic family, UCIP tracks graded changes in continuation weighting rather than merely a binary label. Among the tested models, only the QBM achieves positive Delta. All computations are classical; "quantum" refers only to the mathematical formalism. UCIP does not detect consciousness or subjective experience; it detects statistical structure in latent representations that correlates with known objectives.

247. Saturable absorption in diamond nanophotonics FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Christopher Coutts, Nicholas J. Sorensen, Elham Zohari, Sean McNaney, Sigurd Flågan, Paul E. Barclay
Published: 2026-03-11
TL;DR: 该论文研究了缺陷丰富的金刚石微盘腔中的可饱和吸收现象，通过功率相关光谱测量确定了波长相关的吸收系数和饱和强度，并指出氢相关缺陷可能是观察到的吸收的起源。
摘要翻译

金刚石因其能够承载基于晶体缺陷（如氮空位中心）的量子比特而成为领先的量子光子学平台。利用富含缺陷的金刚石制备纳米光子器件，是许多量子传感技术的核心，有望提升金刚石量子传感器的性能与集成度。本文展示了由富含缺陷的金刚石制备的微盘腔，其支持具有高品质因子（在1042纳米处$Q\sim7\times10^4$）的光学模式，并证明其表现出可饱和吸收特性。通过开展979纳米至1604纳米范围内的功率依赖光谱测量，我们提取了波长相关的吸收系数与饱和强度，结果表明氢相关缺陷可能是观测到的吸收现象的根源。在1047纳米处，我们测得饱和强度为3.3 (1) MW/cm$^2$，吸收系数为0.537 (4) cm$^{-1}$。这些结果为理解金刚石纳米光子学中缺陷介导的光学损耗提供了依据，并为未来金刚石光子器件中利用缺陷诱导的非线性效应提出了策略。

Abstract

Diamond is a leading quantum photonics platform due to its ability to host qubits based on crystal defects such as nitrogen vacancy centres. Fabricating nanophotonic devices from defect-rich diamond, which is central to many quantum sensing technologies, promises to enable enhanced performance and integrability of diamond quantum sensors. Here we demonstrate microdisk cavities fabricated from defect-rich diamond that support optical modes with high quality factor ($Q\sim7\times10^4$ at 1042 nm), and show that they exhibit saturable absorption. Power dependent spectroscopy measurements spanning 979 nm to 1604 nm are used to extract wavelength-dependent absorption coefficients and saturation intensities, which indicate that a hydrogen-related defect is a likely origin of the observed absorption. At 1047 nm, we measure a saturation intensity of 3.3 (1) MW/cm$^2$ and an absorption coefficient of 0.537 (4) cm$^{-1}$. These results provide insight into defect-mediated optical loss in diamond nanophotonics and suggest strategies to harness defect-induced nonlinearities in future diamond photonic devices.

248. QuaNTUM: A Modular Quantum Communication Testbed for Scalable Fiber and Satellite Integration FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Julien Chénedé, Tjorben Matthes, Josefine Krause, Asli Cakan, Tobias Vogl
Published: 2026-03-11
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个名为QuaNTUM的模块化量子通信测试平台，用于在光纤校园网络和卫星-地面链路中进行可扩展的量子密钥分发和纠缠分发实验，为未来全球量子网络奠定基础。
摘要翻译

安全通信对现代社会至关重要，从金融交易到关键基础设施均不可或缺。随着经典加密面临计算能力进步带来的威胁，量子通信基于物理定律提供了一种本质安全的替代方案。 我们在此介绍慕尼黑工业大学量子网络（QuaNTUM），这是一个模块化、可扩展的量子通信测试平台，支持在基于光纤的校园网络和星地链路中进行可扩展的实验。该地面网络通过单模光纤以星型拓扑连接慕尼黑附近加兴的研究机构，网络中包含保偏组件、多路复用器和时间同步分析模块。主动偏振控制和实时反馈系统支持稳定的量子比特传输，从而实现高保真度的量子密钥分发和纠缠分发。 该平台的一个关键特性是集成了确定性固态单光子源，包括六方氮化硼中的缺陷和受激发的铒原子，并已初步部署于小型卫星上，以桥接地基与自由空间信道。作为一个开放访问平台，QuaNTUM支持协议开发、设备基准测试和混合网络研究，为可扩展的量子通信及未来全球量子网络奠定了基础。

Abstract

Secure communication is essential for modern society, from financial transactions to critical infrastructure. As classical encryption faces threats from advancing computational power, quantum communication provides a fundamentally secure alternative based on physical laws. We present QuaNTUM (Quantum Network at the Technical University of Munich), a modular and extensible quantum communication testbed enabling scalable experiments across fiber-based campus networks and satellite-ground links. The terrestrial network connects research institutions in Garching near Munich via single-mode fibers in a star topology with polarization-maintaining components, multiplexers, and time-synchronized analysis modules. Active polarization control and real-time feedback support stable qubit transmission for high-fidelity quantum key distribution and entanglement distribution. A key feature is the integration of deterministic solid-state single-photon sources, including defects in hexagonal boron nitride and excited erbium atoms, with initial deployments on small satellites to bridge terrestrial and free-space channels. As an open-access platform, QuaNTUM enables protocol development, device benchmarking, and hybrid network research, providing a foundation for scalable quantum communication and future global quantum networks.

249. Many-Body Entanglement Properties of Finite Interacting Fermionic Hamiltonians FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Irakli Giorgadze, Grayson Welch, Haixuan Huang, Elio J. König, Jukka I. Väyrynen
Published: 2026-03-11
TL;DR: 该论文研究了有限相互作用费米子哈密顿量的多体纠缠性质，证明了若哈密顿量仅包含最多M体相互作用项，则其N粒子基态不能是最大M体纠缠的，并分析了纠缠对相互作用强度的约束以及在Hubbard和扩展SYK模型中的动力学演化。
摘要翻译

我们通过$M$体约化密度矩阵分析相互作用费米子体系中的多体纠缠。我们证明，若一个粒子数守恒的费米子哈密顿量仅包含不超过$M$体的相互作用项，则其$N$粒子基态不可能是最大$M$体纠缠态。作为证明的关键步骤，我们指出最大$M$体混合态的能量期望值等于哈密顿量在对应$N$粒子子空间上的谱平均值。我们进一步论证，基态的多体纠缠结构可对其母哈密顿量的相互作用强度施加定量约束。我们在哈伯德模型（Hubbard model）与扩展SYK模型中阐释该定理及其推论。超越基态研究，我们分析了这些模型中从斯莱特行列式（Slater-determinant）初态出发、在幺正动力学下的纠缠生成过程，确定了早期增长规律并估算了纠缠饱和时间。最后，我们推导了在阿贝尔对称性（Abelian symmetry）存在时$M$体纠缠的显式对称性细化饱和上界。

Abstract

We analyze many-body entanglement in interacting fermionic systems by using the $M$-body reduced density matrix. We demonstrate that if a particle number conserving fermionic Hamiltonian contains only up to $M$-body interaction terms, then its $N$-particle ground state cannot be maximally $M$-body entangled. As a key step in the proof, we show that the energy expectation value of a maximally $M$-body mixed state is equal to the spectral mean of the Hamiltonian on the corresponding $N$-particle subspace. We further demonstrate that the many-body entanglement structure of a ground state can place quantitative constraint on the interaction strength of its parent Hamiltonian. We illustrate the theorem and its implications in Hubbard and extended SYK models. Going beyond ground states, we analyze entanglement generation under unitary dynamics from Slater-determinant initial states in these models. We determine early-time growth and estimate entanglement saturation times. Finally, we derive explicit symmetry-refined saturation upper bounds for $M$-body entanglement in the presence of an Abelian symmetry.

250. Focusing Surface-Acoustic-Wave Resonators on Thin-Film Lithium Niobate with Transverse-Mode Suppression FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Ryo Sasaki, Ryusuke Hisatomi, Rekishu Yamazaki, Yuya Yamaguchi, Yasunobu Nakamura, Atsushi Noguchi
Published: 2026-03-11
TL;DR: 该论文研究了在薄膜铌酸锂上开发单模聚焦表面声波谐振器，通过轮廓电极和切趾技术实现了声波聚焦并抑制了高阶横向模式。
摘要翻译

表面声波（SAW）谐振器是构建混合量子系统的一种极具前景的平台，其受限的声波能够与多种物理系统实现强相互作用。聚焦式表面声波谐振器通过减小模体积并抑制衍射损耗，近年来已在此类混合系统中得到研究应用。然而，该谐振器会引入额外的横向模式共振，从而产生非期望的响应。本研究在蓝宝石衬底上的薄膜铌酸锂平台上开发了单模聚焦式表面声波谐振器。当薄膜厚度小于表面声波波长时，高度受限的声波模式能够被局域在衬底表面。通过采用遵循二维高斯光束形状的轮廓化电极，我们将表面声波模式聚焦至接近衍射极限，并利用光学成像技术予以验证。应用于叉指换能器电极的切趾技术有效抑制了高阶横向模式的激发。

Abstract

Surface-acoustic-wave (SAW) resonators are a promising platform for constructing hybrid quantum systems, where confined acoustic waves enable strong interaction with various physical systems. Focusing SAW resonators, reducing mode volume while suppressing diffraction losses, have recently been investigated for application in such hybrid systems. However, the resonator leads to additional transverse-mode resonances, which cause undesired responses. In this work, we develop single-mode focusing SAW resonators on a thin-film lithium niobate on sapphire. A film thinner than the SAW wavelength allows a highly confined acoustic-wave mode to be localized on the substrate surface. By using contoured electrodes following a two-dimensional Gaussian beam shape, we make the SAW mode focused to nearly a diffraction-limited and confirm it via optical imaging. The apodization technique applied to the interdigitated transducer electrodes suppresses the excitation of higher-order transverse modes.

251. Quantum tomography of $H \to ZZ, WW$ beyond leading order FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: J. A. Aguilar-Saavedra, Pier Paolo Giardino
Published: 2026-03-11
TL;DR: 该论文研究了希格斯玻色子衰变到ZZ和WW玻色子对的量子层析技术，发现高阶修正在构建自旋密度算符时会导致非物理结果，需要对这些修正进行扣除才能进行一致的量子层析分析。
摘要翻译

我们重新审视了在存在高阶修正情况下的 $H \to ZZ$ 与 $H \to WW$ 过程的量子层析成像。我们证实，无论是使用有效自旋分析能力（仅适用于 $ZZ$ 过程）还是采用光子排除法，都不足以使朴素构建的自旋密度算符满足物理性要求。因此，必须扣除高阶修正才能进行一致的量子层析分析。与当前数据预期的实验不确定性相比，此类修正的幅度较小。作为附带成果，我们指出了在 $H \to WW$ 过程中观测到宇称破坏效应的显著可能性。

Abstract

We revisit quantum tomography of $H \to ZZ$ and $H \to WW$ in the presence of higher-order corrections. We verify that neither the use of an effective spin analysing power (only for $ZZ$) or a photon veto are sufficient to render the naively-constructed spin density operators physical. A subtraction of higher-order corrections is thus necessary to perform consistent quantum tomography. Such corrections are small when compared to expected experimental uncertainties with current data. As a by-product, we point out the striking possibility to observe parity-violating effects in $H \to WW$.

252. Infinite Distance Extrapolation: How error mitigation can enhance quantum error correction FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: George Umbrarescu, Oscar Higgott, Dan E. Browne
Published: 2026-03-11
TL;DR: 该论文研究了如何将量子错误缓解（QEM）与量子纠错（QEC）相结合，通过零噪声外推（ZNE）技术利用纠错码距离作为噪声参数，在旋转表面码上验证了该方法能有效降低逻辑错误率。
摘要翻译

量子错误缓解（Quantum Error Mitigation，QEM）与量子错误纠正（Quantum Error Correction，QEC）通常被视为两个独立的研究领域，而将这两种方法以非平凡方式结合的问题直到最近才开始被探索。本文探讨了二者交叉的一种新范式，该方法基于零噪声外推（Zero-Noise Extrapolation，ZNE）这一错误缓解技术，并以纠错码的距离作为噪声参数。这与一些其他方案不同：在此框架中，QEC 被用作 QEM 内部的子程序，而其他提案则是在 QEC 实验中将 QEM 作为子程序使用。直观上，我们利用了物理噪声水平的降低与码距的增加具有相似性这一事实，因为二者均会导致逻辑错误率的下降。因此，ZNE 中向零噪声的外推，在本方法中可类比为向无限距离的外推。我们描述了如何从容错计算中计算期望值，并为所设想的参数选择提供了分析性依据。我们针对旋转表面码，在电路级噪声模型和实际设备缺陷条件下，探究了该方法在降低一系列期望值误差方面的表现，并特别证明即使对于非稳定子输入态，该方法的性能依然保持有效。

Abstract

Quantum error mitigation (QEM) and quantum error correction (QEC) are two research areas that are often considered as distinct entities, and the problem of combining the two approaches in a non-trivial way has only recently started to be explored. In this paper, we explore a paradigm at the intersection of the two, based on the error mitigation technique of Zero-Noise Extrapolation (ZNE), that uses the distance of an error correcting code as a noise parameter. This is distinct from some alternative approaches, as QEC is here used as a subroutine inside the QEM framework, while other proposals use QEM as a subroutine inside QEC experiments. Intuitively, we exploit the fact that a reduction in the physical noise level is analogous to an increase in the code distance, as both of them result in a decrease in the logical error rate. As such, the extrapolation to zero noise in the case of ZNE becomes comparable to the extrapolation to infinite distance in the case of this method. We describe how to calculate expectation values from a fault-tolerant computation, and we gain some analytical intuition for our ansatz choice. We explore the performance of the considered method to reduce the errors in a range of expectation values for a realistic circuit-level noise model and realistic device imperfections on the rotated surface code, and we particularly show that the performance of the method holds even in the case of non-stabiliser input states.

253. A First-Principles Thermodynamic Uncertainty Relation for Shortcuts to Adiabaticity FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Guillermo Perna, Federico Centrone, Esteban Calzetta
Published: 2026-03-11
TL;DR: 该论文研究了在量子时钟控制下实施绝热捷径协议时的基本限制，发现了一个热力学不确定性类型的权衡关系，将可实现精度与由时钟精度和协议灵敏度设定的不可约纯度损失联系起来。
摘要翻译

我们研究了当“时间”由量子时钟而非外部经典参数提供时，实现含时哈密顿量协议的基本限制。对于一个通过绝热捷径（STA）方案控制并与最小时钟自由度耦合的参数化谐振子，对时钟自由度进行迹运算后，得到的有效约化动力学表现为一系列酉高斯轨迹的混合。在噪声主导的机制下，我们计算了真空态与相干初态下，系统能量与目标STA结果的偏差及其涨落，同时分析了演化过程相对于目标演化的保真度以及约化态的纯度损失。综合这些可观测量，我们得出了一个热力学不确定关系类型的权衡关系，该关系将可实现的精度与由时钟精度和协议灵敏度决定的不可约纯度损失联系起来。

Abstract

We study the fundamental limitations of implementing time-dependent Hamiltonian protocols when ''time'' is provided by a quantum clock rather than an external classical parameter. For a parametric harmonic oscillator controlled through a shortcut-to-adiabaticity (STA) schedule and coupled to a minimal clock degree of freedom, tracing out the clock yields an effective reduced dynamics that is a mixture of unitary Gaussian trajectories. Within a noise-dominated regime, we compute the energetic deviation from the target STA outcome and its fluctuations, together with the fidelity to the target evolution and the purity loss of the reduced state, for vacuum and coherent initial states. Combining these observables produces a thermodynamic-uncertainty-type tradeoff that links achievable precision to an irreducible loss of purity set by the clock precision and the protocol sensitivity.

254. Higher-Order Quantum Objects are Strong Profunctors FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Matt Wilson, James Hefford
Published: 2026-03-11
TL;DR: 该论文证明了在量子理论中，基于因果约束和组合约束的高阶映射构造可以通过一个从因果范畴到强profunctor范畴的函子相统一，从而将高阶量子理论推广到一般对称幺半范畴上。
摘要翻译

我们探讨了分别基于因果性约束与组合性约束的现有高阶量子理论构造在何种意义上具有一致性。具体而言，我们构造了一个从高阶因果范畴到一阶因果过程的强profunctor范畴的函子F : Caus(C) -> StProf(C1)，该函子在C为可加范畴时具有lax-lax双幺半性、完全性、忠实性及强闭性。当C = CP（完全正映射范畴）时，此嵌入进一步在双幺半范畴的序列器上表现强性质，这体现了利用profunctor的coend演算来解释单向信号传递（而非一般非信号传递）约束的可能性。我们得出结论：在组合性约束可用于表达因果性约束的范围内，profunctor方法将高阶量子理论推广为基于一般对称幺半范畴的构造。

Abstract

We explore the sense in which the existing constructions for higher-order maps on quantum theory based on causality constraints and compositionality constraints respectively, coincide. More precisely, we construct a functor F : Caus(C) -> StProf(C1) from higher-order causal categories to the category of strong profunctors over first-order causal processes that is lax-lax duoidal, full, faithful, and strongly closed whenever C is additive. When C = CP this embedding is furthermore strong on the sequencer for duoidal categories, expressing the possibility to interpret one-way signalling (but not general non-signalling) constraints in terms of the coend calculus for profunctors. We conclude that insofar as compositional constraints can be used to express causality constraints, the profunctorial approach generalises higher-order quantum theory to a construction over general symmetric monoidal categories.

255. Unitary imaginary time evolution and ground state preparation using multi-copy protocols FAIL
Score: 0.0 / 29.0
Authors: Tal Schwartzman, Torsten V. Zache, Hannes Pichler, H. R. Sadeghpour
Published: 2026-03-11
TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种使用多副本协议和虚时演化的确定性酉协议，用于量子计算中的高效基态制备，并分析了两种具体的电路架构及其性能。
摘要翻译

高效的低能态制备是量子计算与量子模拟的核心目标之一。量子虚时演化以虚时动力学替代实时动力学，从而指数级抑制高能本征态。本文提出确定性酉协议，用于近似虚时演化以实现基态制备。该协议需要系统的多个副本、系统哈密顿量下的实时演化以及受控SWAP操作（或更广义的SWAP生成酉操作）。我们分析了两类具体电路架构：一种树状结构具有可证明的多项式深度收敛性，但宽度快速增长；另一种紧凑的“树篱”架构在数值模拟支持的启发式构造中，仅需多项式宽度即可达到相当的精度。我们提供的数值证据表明，电路运行中的后选择能以实际可行的成功概率加速收敛。此外，我们证明了在基态制备场景中，电路体积可与电路后观测量估计的测量复杂度进行权衡。我们概述了针对特定平台的具体实现路径——这些平台天然适合多副本寄存器与SWAP介导的耦合，从而说明此类混合模拟-数字电路如何在近期补充现有的态制备方法。

Abstract

Efficient low-energy state preparation is a key objective in quantum computation and quantum simulation. Quantum imaginary-time evolution replaces real-time dynamics with imaginary-time dynamics, exponentially suppressing higher-energy eigenstates. We introduce deterministic unitary protocols that approximate imaginary-time evolution for ground-state preparation. The protocols require multiple copies of the system, real-time evolution under the system Hamiltonian, and controlled-SWAP operations (or more general SWAP-generated unitaries). We analyze two concrete circuit families: a tree architecture with provable polynomial-in-depth convergence but rapidly growing width, and a compact "hedge" architecture that achieves comparable accuracy with only polynomial width in a heuristic construction supported by numerics. We provide numerical evidence that mid-circuit post-selection can accelerate convergence with practical success probabilities. Separately, we demonstrate that circuit volume can be traded for the shot complexity of post-circuit observable estimation in the ground-state preparation setting. We outline concrete implementation of platform-specific routes, where multi-copy registers and SWAP-mediated couplings are natural, thereby illustrating how these hybrid analog-digital circuits can complement existing state-preparation methods in the near term.
